pipes.label: Pipes
pipes.desc: PP-R and PP-RCT pipes — standard, fibre-reinforced and UV-stabilised, 12 series.

fittings.label: Fittings
fittings.desc: Socket-fusion and electrofusion fittings, d20–d125, 13 article families.

transitionFittings.label: Transition Fittings
transitionFittings.desc: Transitions to thread and brass — for legacy connections and valves, 13 families.

valves.label: Valves
valves.desc: Ball valves, concealed valves, distribution manifolds — 9 article families.

weldInSaddles.label: Weld-in Saddles
weldInSaddles.desc: Branch connections without cutting the pipe — threaded and unthreaded, 3 families.

accessories.label: Accessories
accessories.desc: Pipe clamps, backing flanges, gaskets, plugs — 5 article families.

tools.label: Tools
tools.desc: Pipe cutters, welding machines and dies for all four jointing methods, 14 families.

k-pipe-pp-r-sdr-6.seo_p1: The K-Pipe PP-R SDR 6 represents the pinnacle of plastic piping technology for modern drinking water supply. As a core component of our comprehensive catalogue, it is engineered to deliver exceptional performance in highly demanding installations.
k-pipe-pp-r-sdr-6.seo_p2: Manufactured from premium PP-R material, this pipe features an SDR 6 rating with a wall thickness designed for high-pressure loads. Operating at 20°C up to 2.0 MPa and 70°C at 1.0 MPa, it provides robust dimensional stability.
k-pipe-pp-r-sdr-6.seo_p3: Ideal for both commercial and residential applications, its extremely smooth internal surface minimises friction and pressure loss. This ensures outstanding energy efficiency, absolute hygiene, and a maintenance-free lifespan spanning decades.

k-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p1: Our K-Pipe PP-RCT SDR 7.4 is a cutting-edge solution within our piping range, tailored specifically for advanced water distribution networks. It offers unparalleled resilience for modern construction projects that demand the highest standards.
k-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p2: Constructed using advanced PP-RCT, this pipe benefits from an enhanced crystalline structure. The SDR 7.4 specification allows for thinner walls without compromising the high operational pressure rating of 2.0 MPa at 20°C.
k-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p3: The larger internal diameter facilitates significantly increased flow rates. Consequently, it is perfectly suited for high-capacity industrial systems and high-rise developments, reducing the overall weight while maintaining superior burst resistance.

k-pipe-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p1: Designed for versatility, the K-Pipe PP-R SDR 11 is a fundamental element of our piping portfolio. It serves as an incredibly reliable conduit for cold water services across a multitude of architectural environments.
k-pipe-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p2: This standard PP-R pipe is precisely extruded to an SDR 11 specification. With a pressure rating of 1.2 MPa at 20°C, it balances material efficiency with robust structural integrity, offering an optimal S 5 pipe series design.
k-pipe-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p3: By ensuring a 100% leak-free installation through secure thermal fusion, it is highly recommended for cold water mains and air conditioning chilled water lines. Its corrosion-proof nature guarantees long-term purity and low maintenance costs.

k-pipe-purple-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p1: The K-Pipe Purple PP-R SDR 11 provides a distinct, immediately recognisable solution within our pipe category. It has been expressly developed for non-potable water systems, ensuring strict adherence to cross-connection prevention protocols.
k-pipe-purple-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p2: Featuring the same reliable PP-R composition and SDR 11 dimensions as our standard cold water pipes, it is safely rated for 1.2 MPa at 20°C. The striking violet colouration is permanently integrated into the polymer matrix.
k-pipe-purple-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p3: This pipe is the premier choice for rainwater harvesting, irrigation, and reclaimed water applications. The clear visual coding prevents hazardous mix-ups on complex construction sites, safeguarding public health and system integrity.

k-fiber-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p1: At the forefront of composite piping, the K-Fiber Pipe PP-RCT SDR 7.4 is an elite product in our advanced catalogue. It sets new benchmarks for thermal stability in high-temperature distribution networks.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p2: This pipe integrates a fibre-reinforced middle layer within a high-performance PP-RCT structure. The SDR 7.4 rating ensures robust pressure handling capability, whilst the composite design reduces thermal expansion by approximately 50%.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p3: It is exceptionally well-suited for demanding heating installations and hot water risers. Installers benefit from fewer required support brackets and an inherently rigid structure, drastically cutting down installation time and overall project costs.

k-fiberclima-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-11.seo_p1: The K-Fiberclima Pipe PP-RCT SDR 11 is specifically tailored for the HVAC sector, bridging the gap between mechanical strength and thermal efficiency in our piping assortment.
k-fiberclima-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-11.seo_p2: Utilising a specialised PP-RCT and fibre-composite construction, this SDR 11 pipe is optimised for moderate pressure zones up to 1.6 MPa at 20°C. The multi-layer extrusion minimises linear expansion significantly.
k-fiberclima-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-11.seo_p3: Perfect for chilled water lines, climate control systems, and complex heating circuits, it delivers outstanding structural rigidity. This translates to fewer expansion loops and a cleaner, more streamlined visual profile in exposed installations.

k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-74.seo_p1: Recognised for its immense strength, the K-Fiber Pipe PP-R SDR 7.4 is a premium fibre-reinforced conduit. It is designed to tackle the rigorous demands of industrial fluid transport and domestic hot water systems.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-74.seo_p2: Combining a classic PP-R formulation with a rigid fibreglass core layer, it boasts an SDR 7.4 pressure rating. This composite architecture effortlessly manages operating pressures up to 2.5 MPa at standard room temperatures.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-74.seo_p3: Its resistance to sagging and bending makes it highly sought after for long, suspended pipe runs in industrial facilities. The homogeneous welding process guarantees a seamless, permanent joint that withstands immense mechanical stress.

k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-9.seo_p1: The K-Fiber Pipe PP-R SDR 9 is a uniquely balanced composite pipe within our fibre-reinforced range. It offers an excellent compromise between fluid capacity and wall thickness for medium-to-high pressure applications.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-9.seo_p2: Engineered with a PP-R and fibre-composite structure, the SDR 9 dimensioning caters to an operational pressure of 2.0 MPa at 20°C. This specific series provides enhanced rigidity while keeping weight manageable.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-9.seo_p3: Installers favour this pipe for extensive commercial heating networks and industrial cooling circuits. The reduced thermal expansion ensures that pipelines remain perfectly straight, promoting long-term structural integrity and minimal maintenance.

k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p1: Our K-Fiber Pipe PP-R SDR 11 represents a cost-effective yet highly robust composite solution for standard heating and cooling applications, cementing its place as a versatile component in our catalogue.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p2: This pipe incorporates a reinforcing fibre layer within standard PP-R, manufactured to an SDR 11 specification. It safely sustains up to 1.6 MPa at 20°C, offering remarkable stability compared to conventional monolayer pipes.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-11.seo_p3: It shines in chilled water networks and lower-pressure heating installations. The composite reinforcement vastly reduces the need for frequent pipe clamps, speeding up the installation process whilst ensuring a pristine finish.

k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-17.seo_p1: The K-Fiber Pipe PP-R SDR 17 is the titan of our piping range, engineered specifically for large-scale infrastructure and substantial flow volumes. It is the ultimate choice for municipal and industrial mainlines.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-17.seo_p2: Constructed from PP-R with fibre reinforcement, this pipe features a thin-walled SDR 17 profile suitable for 1.0 MPa at 20°C. Available in massive dimensions up to 200 mm, it maximises the internal cross-sectional area.
k-fiber-pipe-pp-r-sdr-17.seo_p3: It is predominantly utilised in central cooling plants, large HVAC distribution networks, and industrial water transport. Its high volumetric capacity combined with low weight revolutionises handling and deployment on major construction sites.

k-fiber-uv-pipe-pp-r-sdr-74.seo_p1: Designed to conquer the elements, the K-Fiber UV Pipe PP-R SDR 7.4 is our definitive solution for exterior pipework. It eliminates the need for post-installation protective cladding in outdoor environments.
k-fiber-uv-pipe-pp-r-sdr-74.seo_p2: This advanced PP-R composite pipe is encased in a specially formulated UV-stabilised outer layer. Featuring an SDR 7.4 classification, it easily manages 2.0 MPa at 20°C whilst completely blocking harmful ultraviolet radiation.
k-fiber-uv-pipe-pp-r-sdr-74.seo_p3: It is the perfect match for rooftop cooling towers, exposed industrial lines, and exterior building risers. The permanent UV protection prevents material degradation and brittleness, guaranteeing a decades-long lifespan under direct sunlight.

k-fiber-uv-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p1: The K-Fiber UV Pipe PP-RCT SDR 7.4 combines the supreme thermal capabilities of PP-RCT with ultimate weather resistance. It stands as the most advanced exterior piping product in our catalogue.
k-fiber-uv-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p2: Integrating a fibre-reinforced PP-RCT core with a highly effective UV-resistant shield, this SDR 7.4 pipe is rated for 2.0 MPa at 20°C. The PP-RCT matrix ensures superior burst strength even at elevated temperatures.
k-fiber-uv-pipe-pp-rct-sdr-74.seo_p3: This pipe is indispensable for exposed solar heating arrays and exterior hot water distribution. Its inherent UV immunity drastically reduces installation overheads by negating the need for protective painting or jacketing.

cap.seo_p1: The Cap is an essential component within our fittings catalogue, designed to safely and permanently seal the ends of pipe runs. It ensures a flawless termination in drinking water and heating systems.
cap.seo_p2: Manufactured from high-grade PP-R, this end cap provides the same exceptional pressure rating and thermal resistance as the main piping network. Its robust material composition guarantees complete structural integrity.
cap.seo_p3: This fitting is highly valued in residential and commercial installations for capping off redundant lines or preparing systems for future extensions. The socket fusion welding process ensures a 100% leak-proof, maintenance-free seal.

socket.seo_p1: The Socket is a foundational fitting in our product range, used to securely join two straight lengths of pipe. It guarantees a perfectly aligned, continuous flow path within any fluid transport network.
socket.seo_p2: Injection-moulded from premium PP-R, it boasts remarkable dimensional accuracy and pressure resistance. It is compatible with all standard SDR pipe series, maintaining system-wide mechanical strength.
socket.seo_p3: Widely utilised in both hot and cold water installations, the socket creates a homogeneous joint that eliminates any risk of leakage. This translates to reduced maintenance costs and an extended system lifespan.

elbow-45.seo_p1: The Elbow 45° is a vital directional fitting designed to implement gentle changes in pipeline routing. It forms a crucial part of our comprehensive fittings portfolio, facilitating complex system architectures.
elbow-45.seo_p2: Crafted from superior PP-R, this elbow is engineered to endure standard operational pressures and temperatures effortlessly. The precisely angled 45-degree curve is moulded to minimise flow resistance and internal turbulence.
elbow-45.seo_p3: It is particularly advantageous in confined spaces and large-scale industrial layouts where sweeping directional shifts are preferred. By reducing pressure drops, it helps maintain optimal pump efficiency across the entire network.

elbow-45-femalemale.seo_p1: Our Elbow 45° (Female/Male) provides an innovative solution for tight spatial requirements, enabling direct fitting-to-fitting connections without the need for an intermediate pipe segment.
elbow-45-femalemale.seo_p2: Made from high-quality PP-R, it features one socket (female) and one spigot (male) end. This design retains full pressure handling capabilities while dramatically reducing the overall installation footprint.
elbow-45-femalemale.seo_p3: This specialised fitting is heavily utilised in compact manifold assemblies and intricate plant rooms. It streamlines the installation process, saves valuable space, and ensures a flawless thermal fusion weld.

elbow-90.seo_p1: The Elbow 90° is arguably the most frequently used directional fitting in our catalogue, essential for standard right-angled pipeline deviations. It ensures sharp, precise cornering in any plumbing layout.
elbow-90.seo_p2: Produced from durable PP-R, this 90-degree elbow delivers uncompromising structural strength and temperature resistance. Its internal geometry is meticulously designed to limit cavitation despite the abrupt directional change.
elbow-90.seo_p3: Indispensable for almost every domestic, commercial, and industrial installation, it allows pipes to neatly follow wall contours. The fusion welding technique provides a permanent, leak-free corner joint that lasts for decades.

elbow-90-femalemale.seo_p1: The Elbow 90° (Female/Male) is a space-saving directional component designed for direct integration with other fittings. It is a highly practical addition to our comprehensive fittings selection.
elbow-90-femalemale.seo_p2: Fabricated from robust PP-R, it incorporates a male spigot and a female socket. This unique configuration maintains the system's high pressure rating whilst bypassing the need for a connecting pipe stub.
elbow-90-femalemale.seo_p3: It proves incredibly useful in highly congested plumbing chases and complex valve assemblies. By minimising the number of required welds, it accelerates installation speed and reduces potential points of failure.

electrofusion-socket.seo_p1: The Electrofusion Socket represents the pinnacle of modern jointing technology within our catalogue. It offers an automated, highly secure welding method, especially beneficial for large dimensions and confined spaces.
electrofusion-socket.seo_p2: This high-tech PP-R fitting features embedded heating coils that are energised via a barcode-controlled electrofusion machine. This guarantees an exact, computer-monitored energy transfer, resulting in a perfect fusion independent of ambient conditions.
electrofusion-socket.seo_p3: It is the go-to solution for critical repair works, tight shafts, and large industrial mainlines where manual socket fusion is impractical. The resulting joint is incredibly strong, providing absolute peace of mind for installers.

flange-adaptor.seo_p1: The Flange Adaptor is a critical transitional fitting, bridging the gap between our PP-R plastic systems and flanged metallic components. It is essential for integrating heavy-duty industrial hardware.
flange-adaptor.seo_p2: Moulded from tough PP-R, it features a pronounced collar designed to securely seat a backing ring. It seamlessly handles high system pressures whilst facilitating a standard DN flanged connection.
flange-adaptor.seo_p3: This adaptor is heavily relied upon to connect large circulation pumps, industrial valves, and central water meters to the PP-R network. It allows for robust, demountable connections, drastically simplifying future maintenance tasks.

reducing-bush.seo_p1: The Reducing Bush is a fundamental component for safely stepping down pipe diameters within a straight run. It is an indispensable part of our fittings range for proper system sizing and flow management.
reducing-bush.seo_p2: Engineered from premium PP-R, this male-to-female reducer fits directly into the socket of a larger fitting, immediately accepting a smaller pipe. It maintains full pressure integrity across the transition.
reducing-bush.seo_p3: It is highly effective for transitioning from distribution mains to individual branch lines. Its compact, nested design saves considerable space compared to standard reducers, making it ideal for neat, professional installations.

reducing-tee.seo_p1: Our Reducing Tee is a sophisticated branch fitting designed to split flow whilst simultaneously reducing the pipe diameter. It forms the backbone of efficient water distribution networks.
reducing-tee.seo_p2: Constructed from resilient PP-R, this fitting features a central branch with a smaller diameter than the main run. It is precision-moulded to withstand high temperatures and standard operational pressures without distortion.
reducing-tee.seo_p3: This tee is extensively used to supply secondary lines from a primary circulation loop, such as feeding individual radiators or washrooms. It eliminates the need for separate reducing bushes, resulting in a cleaner, more efficient installation.

reducing-tee-large-sizes.seo_p1: The Reducing Tee (Large Sizes) caters specifically to municipal and industrial-scale projects, facilitating the extraction of smaller branch lines from massive distribution mains.
reducing-tee-large-sizes.seo_p2: Manufactured from heavy-duty PP-R, this large-scale fitting accommodates main pipes from 63 mm up to 75 mm, branching down to standard domestic sizes. It boasts immense burst resistance and thermal stability.
reducing-tee-large-sizes.seo_p3: It is a critical component for large riser shafts in high-rise buildings and district heating networks. Providing a direct, secure step-down, it guarantees a 100% homogeneous weld for absolute leak prevention in critical infrastructure.

tee.seo_p1: The standard Tee is a universally applied fitting designed to split a pipeline into two equal, diverging paths. It is an absolute necessity in our comprehensive fittings catalogue.
tee.seo_p2: Injection-moulded from high-quality PP-R, all three sockets share identical dimensions. The fitting is robustly built to handle maximum system pressures while maintaining a smooth internal transition to minimise turbulence.
tee.seo_p3: This component is fundamental for creating grid layouts and branching circuits in both domestic water supply and industrial cooling systems. The thermal fusion process ensures the branch connection is as strong as the pipe itself.

cross.seo_p1: The Cross fitting provides a highly efficient method for creating four-way intersections within a pipe network. It offers a streamlined alternative to complex, multi-tee assemblies in our catalogue.
cross.seo_p2: Produced from durable PP-R, this central distribution node is engineered to manage complex flow dynamics and high system pressures. Its robust construction ensures long-term dimensional stability.
cross.seo_p3: It is exceptionally beneficial in manifold construction and symmetrical distribution grids, such as underfloor heating systems. By consolidating multiple branches into a single fitting, it saves space and significantly reduces welding time.

cross-over.seo_p1: The Cross Over is a highly specialised bridging fitting designed to elegantly navigate overlapping pipe runs without physical interconnection. It solves complex spatial conflicts in dense installations.
cross-over.seo_p2: Crafted from standard PP-R, this fitting features a distinct, curved arch that allows one pipe to cleanly pass over another. It maintains the system's full pressure rating without impeding flow characteristics.
cross-over.seo_p3: It is invaluable in tight floor screeds, confined wall chases, and complex plant rooms where pipes must cross securely. It eliminates the need to bend pipes artificially, preventing stress fractures and ensuring a professional finish.

cross-over-pipe.seo_p1: Our Cross Over Pipe offers an extended, highly adaptable bridging solution for navigating multiple overlapping obstacles. It is a premium problem-solver in our fittings portfolio.
cross-over-pipe.seo_p2: Made from high-performance PP-R, this component combines an elongated arched section with standard spigot ends. It easily sustains high operating pressures and temperatures while providing a generous clearance gap.
cross-over-pipe.seo_p3: This fitting is highly favoured by installers working on complicated retrofit projects or dense industrial layouts. It ensures that critical pipelines can bypass existing infrastructure seamlessly, maintaining a 100% secure, fusion-welded network.

adaptor-socket-female-thread.seo_p1: The Adaptor Socket (Female Thread) is a fundamental transition fitting within our catalogue, designed to bridge the gap between our advanced PP-R systems and standard threaded metallic components.
adaptor-socket-female-thread.seo_p2: Moulded with a high-grade PP-R socket and a robust, integrated female brass thread (Rp), it ensures exceptional pressure resistance and mechanical stability. The hybrid construction eliminates the risk of galvanic corrosion.
adaptor-socket-female-thread.seo_p3: This adaptor is universally employed to connect PP-R pipelines to existing steel pipework, valves, and sanitary fixtures. It guarantees a highly secure, leak-free transition that satisfies the strictest building codes.

adaptor-socket-male-thread.seo_p1: Our Adaptor Socket (Male Thread) offers a vital connection point for transitioning from PP-R plastic pipework to threaded metal systems. It is an indispensable item in our transition fittings range.
adaptor-socket-male-thread.seo_p2: Featuring a thermal fusion PP-R socket seamlessly bonded to a precisely machined male brass thread (R), this fitting provides outstanding tensile strength. It effortlessly handles standard system pressures without structural degradation.
adaptor-socket-male-thread.seo_p3: It is extensively used to securely mount water meters, heavy-duty pumps, and manifold headers. The male threaded design allows for rapid, secure installation into female-threaded ports across diverse plumbing scenarios.

elbow-90-male-thread.seo_p1: The Elbow 90° (Male Thread) combines a right-angled directional change with a threaded transition, forming a highly efficient dual-purpose fitting within our extensive catalogue.
elbow-90-male-thread.seo_p2: Constructed from robust PP-R coupled with an integrated male brass thread, this 90-degree elbow delivers formidable temperature resistance. The precisely cast thread ensures a perfect, pressure-tight seal against metallic receivers.
elbow-90-male-thread.seo_p3: This fitting is particularly useful when connecting PP-R distribution lines directly to wall-mounted boilers, radiators, or specialised industrial equipment where a direct, angled threaded entry is mandated.

elbow-bracket-90-female-thread.seo_p1: The Elbow Bracket 90° (Female Thread) is a specialised terminal fitting engineered for secure wall mounting. It is a premium product in our catalogue, ensuring stability at the point of water delivery.
elbow-bracket-90-female-thread.seo_p2: Combining a PP-R body with a female threaded brass insert, this elbow features robust, integrated mounting flanges. It allows for rigid mechanical fixing to brickwork or timber stud frames, guaranteeing zero movement.
elbow-bracket-90-female-thread.seo_p3: It is the standard choice for terminating hot and cold water lines at washbasins, showers, and kitchen sinks. The solid wall anchorage prevents the transmission of operational vibrations and safeguards the pipe connection.

elbowwall-bracket-90-female-thread.seo_p1: Our Elbow/Wall Bracket 90° (Female Thread) offers an enhanced, dual-sided mounting solution for maximum stability at the draw-off point. It represents the pinnacle of secure terminal fittings in our range.
elbowwall-bracket-90-female-thread.seo_p2: Designed with an extended mounting plate and a reinforced PP-R body containing a female brass thread, it provides unparalleled structural rigidity. It effortlessly withstands the mechanical stress of frequently operated taps.
elbowwall-bracket-90-female-thread.seo_p3: Primarily specified for heavy-use public washrooms, hospital scrub sinks, and robust commercial installations. The dual-sided bracket ensures the fitting remains permanently immovable, protecting the concealed pipework from damage.

metal-union-male-thread-yellow-brass.seo_p1: The Metal Union — Male Thread (Yellow Brass) provides a high-quality, demountable connection point for our piping systems. It is a crucial component for installations requiring future accessibility and maintenance.
metal-union-male-thread-yellow-brass.seo_p2: This union pairs a thermal fusion PP-R tail with a premium CW617N yellow brass male threaded end. The precision-machined union nut allows the connection to be securely tightened and subsequently disassembled without pipe cutting.
metal-union-male-thread-yellow-brass.seo_p3: It is highly recommended for connecting large circulation pumps, heat exchangers, and central filtration units. The ability to easily decouple these appliances drastically minimises downtime during routine maintenance or emergency replacements.

metal-union-female-thread-yellow-brass.seo_p1: Our Metal Union — Female Thread (Yellow Brass) is an essential demountable transition fitting, designed for seamless integration with male-threaded industrial and domestic appliances.
metal-union-female-thread-yellow-brass.seo_p2: Incorporating a standard PP-R socket and a robust female thread fashioned from CW617N yellow brass, this union is built for longevity. The internal sealing face ensures a completely watertight joint under high system pressures.
metal-union-female-thread-yellow-brass.seo_p3: This fitting is indispensable when installing water heaters, pressure vessels, and complex valve stations. It affords installers the flexibility to disconnect equipment rapidly, facilitating hassle-free servicing and system upgrades.

metal-union-male-thread.seo_p1: The Metal Union — Male Thread is a versatile, heavy-duty demountable fitting within our transition range. It is engineered to provide a robust, temporary disconnection point within permanent pipe networks.
metal-union-male-thread.seo_p2: Featuring a PP-R fusion end and a high-strength male threaded metallic tail, this union is designed for superior mechanical resilience. The threaded collar allows for a high-torque seal that easily withstands thermal cycling.
metal-union-male-thread.seo_p3: Ideal for mechanical plant rooms and industrial fluid processing lines where equipment must be periodically isolated or removed. It ensures a 100% reliable seal whilst retaining complete system modularity.

metal-union-female-thread.seo_p1: The Metal Union — Female Thread offers a secure, easily dismantlable connection to male-threaded components. It is a highly specified transition fitting in our comprehensive product catalogue.
metal-union-female-thread.seo_p2: This union combines a PP-R welding socket with a heavy-duty female threaded metal insert. Its design features a precision-engineered flat sealing surface that guarantees excellent pressure retention and leak prevention.
metal-union-female-thread.seo_p3: Commonly deployed at critical junctions such as boiler connections and central manifold inlets. It provides building managers and maintenance engineers with a quick, non-destructive method for equipment isolation.

tee-90-male-thread.seo_p1: The Tee 90° (Male Thread) is an innovative branching fitting that simultaneously splits the fluid flow and provides a threaded transition. It is an excellent space-saving solution in our catalogue.
tee-90-male-thread.seo_p2: Crafted from high-grade PP-R, this tee features two standard fusion sockets on the main run and a central male brass thread on the branch. It maintains uniform pressure ratings across the entire assembly.
tee-90-male-thread.seo_p3: This fitting is highly effective for directly mounting pressure gauges, drainage valves, or sensor probes into the main pipeline. It eliminates the need for additional threaded adaptors, ensuring a compact, leak-proof branch.

tee-90-female-thread.seo_p1: Our Tee 90° (Female Thread) provides a highly practical method for branching a PP-R line directly into a threaded metallic connection. It is a cornerstone of efficient network design in our fittings range.
tee-90-female-thread.seo_p2: Moulded with a durable PP-R body, it features a central branch equipped with a precisely machined female brass thread. It offers exceptional resistance to both mechanical stress and extreme fluid temperatures.
tee-90-female-thread.seo_p3: It is frequently utilised to incorporate threaded isolation valves, thermostatic controls, or air vents directly into the primary piping circuit. The integrated design reduces joint numbers, accelerating installation and enhancing system reliability.

union.seo_p1: The standard Union is a fully plastic, demountable connection fitting designed for purely PP-R to PP-R networks. It is an essential maintenance component within our extensive catalogue.
union.seo_p2: Manufactured entirely from premium PP-R, this union comprises two fusion tails and a robust threaded collar. It delivers the same exceptional chemical and thermal resistance as the main piping system, preventing any galvanic issues.
union.seo_p3: This all-plastic union is critical for sections of pipework that require regular cleaning or inspection, such as industrial process lines or laboratory drainage. It allows the pipeline to be parted effortlessly without sawing.

union-for-watermeters.seo_p1: The Union for Watermeters is a highly specialised transition fitting meticulously designed to accommodate standard domestic and commercial metering equipment.
union-for-watermeters.seo_p2: Incorporating a PP-R fusion socket and a uniquely dimensioned threaded captive nut, this union is tailored to fit the specific threads of utility water meters. It provides a secure, tamper-evident, and pressure-tight seal.
union-for-watermeters.seo_p3: It is the mandated choice for main water ingress points in residential blocks and commercial facilities. The specialised design greatly simplifies the initial installation and subsequent periodic replacement of utility meters.

pp-r-ball-valve-ball-in-pp.seo_p1: The PP-R Ball Valve (Ball in PP) is a highly reliable shut-off mechanism within our valves portfolio, designed for robust flow control in standard water distribution systems.
pp-r-ball-valve-ball-in-pp.seo_p2: Constructed entirely from high-grade PP-R, including the internal ball, this valve guarantees complete resistance to corrosion and scaling. It seamlessly integrates into piping networks via dual socket fusion, easily handling standard operating pressures.
pp-r-ball-valve-ball-in-pp.seo_p3: This all-plastic valve is extensively used in domestic and commercial plumbing where metallic components are undesirable. The full-bore design minimises pressure loss, while the durable construction ensures a maintenance-free, long-lasting shut-off solution.

pp-r-ball-valve-ball-in-brass-chromium-p.seo_p1: Our PP-R Ball Valve (Ball in Brass, Chromium Plated) offers premium flow control for heavy-duty applications. It stands as one of the most resilient shut-off components in our catalogue.
pp-r-ball-valve-ball-in-brass-chromium-p.seo_p2: Encased in a solid PP-R body, the core mechanism features a precision-machined brass ball with a heavy chromium plating. This hybrid design delivers extraordinary wear resistance and maintains seal integrity under extreme pressure and temperature variations.
pp-r-ball-valve-ball-in-brass-chromium-p.seo_p3: Specified for demanding industrial circuits, aggressive fluid transport, and central heating systems, this valve provides immediate, tactile feedback. It is the definitive choice when absolute reliability and uncompromising durability are required.

tee-90-female-thread-for-internal-valve.seo_p1: The Tee 90° (Female Thread) for Internal Valve is a specialised foundation fitting designed specifically to house concealed shut-off mechanisms. It is a critical enabler for sleek, flush-mounted plumbing designs.
tee-90-female-thread-for-internal-valve.seo_p2: Moulded from our signature PP-R material, this tee incorporates a reinforced central branch with a precision female brass thread. It is engineered to seamlessly receive standard concealed valve bodies without compromising the main line's pressure rating.
tee-90-female-thread-for-internal-valve.seo_p3: It is indispensable in high-end bathroom installations and luxury hotel suites where exposed pipework is unacceptable. Providing a rigid, secure housing, it ensures the concealed valve operates flawlessly behind finished walls.

concealed-valve-chrome-light-part.seo_p1: The Concealed Valve Chrome — Light Part is the elegant, visible control interface for our flush-mounted valve systems. It perfectly complements modern sanitary aesthetics within our accessories range.
concealed-valve-chrome-light-part.seo_p2: Manufactured with a premium chrome finish, this visible escutcheon and spindle assembly is designed to resist tarnishing and limescale build-up. It couples precisely with the heavy internal valve body, ensuring smooth mechanical operation.
concealed-valve-chrome-light-part.seo_p3: Installed in modern bathrooms, shower enclosures, and premium washrooms, it provides users with tactile, effortless flow control. The brilliant chrome plating guarantees a lasting, high-quality finish that withstands rigorous daily cleaning.

concealed-valve-chrome-heavy-part.seo_p1: Our Concealed Valve Chrome — Heavy Part forms the rugged, hidden mechanical core of our flush-mounted shut-off assemblies. It is the hidden powerhouse within our valve catalogue.
concealed-valve-chrome-heavy-part.seo_p2: Forged from solid, corrosion-resistant brass, this heavy-duty valve body is engineered to sit permanently within the PP-R receiver tee. Its robust spindle mechanism guarantees a flawless, watertight seal even after thousands of actuation cycles.
concealed-valve-chrome-heavy-part.seo_p3: Completely concealed behind plaster and tiles, it is relied upon for absolutely secure flow isolation in luxury residential and commercial developments. It ensures that the critical shut-off function remains 100% reliable, decade after decade.

straight-seat-valve-upper-part-green-han.seo_p1: The Straight Seat Valve — Upper Part with Green Handle is a precision control component designed to regulate flow dynamically. It provides nuanced fluid management within our comprehensive valve range.
straight-seat-valve-upper-part-green-han.seo_p2: This robust upper assembly features a finely threaded spindle and a highly visible green handwheel. It is engineered for exact flow throttling, allowing operators to fine-tune system pressure with unparalleled accuracy and minimal effort.
straight-seat-valve-upper-part-green-han.seo_p3: It is extensively deployed in industrial plant rooms, complex distribution manifolds, and central heating hubs. The ergonomic handle provides superior grip, enabling rapid system balancing and immediate isolation during maintenance routines.

elongation-pieces.seo_p1: Elongation Pieces are vital problem-solving accessories within our catalogue, designed to accommodate varying wall thicknesses during the installation of concealed plumbing fixtures.
elongation-pieces.seo_p2: Machined from high-strength, corrosion-resistant alloys, these precision extensions bridge the gap between deeply recessed valve bodies and the finished wall surface. They ensure mechanical continuity without compromising the valve's operational integrity.
elongation-pieces.seo_p3: Installers consider these pieces essential for retrofit projects and bespoke architectural builds where plaster or tiling depths fluctuate. They guarantee that the final chrome trims fit perfectly flush, ensuring a flawless visual result.

battery-female-thread.seo_p1: The Battery (Female Thread) is a sophisticated manifold component designed for multi-circuit fluid distribution. It acts as the central nerve centre for complex heating and water supply networks.
battery-female-thread.seo_p2: Constructed from rigid PP-R with multiple integrated female brass threaded outlets, it easily manages high volumetric flow rates and system pressures. The monolithic design eliminates the need to weld multiple individual tees together.
battery-female-thread.seo_p3: This distribution battery is primarily utilised in underfloor heating systems and centralised domestic water routing. It provides a neat, highly organised connection hub, vastly reducing installation time and minimising potential leak points.

adjustable-battery-female-thread.seo_p1: Our Adjustable Battery (Female Thread) offers ultimate flexibility for multi-circuit distribution, representing the most advanced manifold solution in our catalogue.
adjustable-battery-female-thread.seo_p2: Featuring the same robust PP-R and brass construction as our standard battery, this adjustable version incorporates variable centre-to-centre distances between the outlets. It maintains exceptional pressure resistance whilst offering mechanical adaptability.
adjustable-battery-female-thread.seo_p3: It is the definitive choice for bespoke plant rooms and non-standard plumbing layouts where fixed manifolds fall short. Installers benefit from unparalleled freedom to route complex pipework cleanly and efficiently.

weld-in-saddle.seo_p1: The Weld-in Saddle is an ingenious branching fitting that allows new lines to be integrated into existing mains without severing the pipe. It is a highly efficient addition to our catalogue.
weld-in-saddle.seo_p2: Moulded entirely from high-grade PP-R, the saddle is fusion-welded directly onto the exterior wall of the main pipe. This process creates a flawless, homogeneous bond that matches the pressure rating of the host pipeline.
weld-in-saddle.seo_p3: Highly favoured for system expansions and retrofitting, it permits the rapid addition of secondary branches in live industrial environments. It drastically cuts downtime and eliminates the need for bulky, space-consuming reducing tees.

weld-in-saddle-female-thread.seo_p1: Our Weld-in Saddle (Female Thread) combines the efficiency of saddle welding with the convenience of a threaded transition. It is a highly sought-after component for modern system upgrades.
weld-in-saddle-female-thread.seo_p2: This fitting pairs a PP-R weld-in base with an integrated female brass thread. It allows for the direct attachment of threaded metallic valves or sensors to the main pipe wall, maintaining excellent thermal and mechanical stability.
weld-in-saddle-female-thread.seo_p3: It is extensively used in large distribution networks for installing pressure gauges, drainage points, or temperature probes. The saddle design ensures these critical instruments can be added swiftly without massive system disruption.

weld-in-saddle-male-thread.seo_p1: The Weld-in Saddle (Male Thread) offers a robust, protruding threaded connection point directly from the main pipeline. It is an essential component for complex industrial retrofits within our range.
weld-in-saddle-male-thread.seo_p2: Featuring a PP-R fusion saddle fused with a precisely machined male brass thread, this fitting delivers immense tensile strength. It securely anchors heavy-duty threaded equipment to the exterior of the pipe without compromising flow dynamics.
weld-in-saddle-male-thread.seo_p3: Ideal for mounting robust isolation valves and industrial monitoring equipment directly onto large primary mains. It provides engineers with a fast, highly secure method to modify existing infrastructure whilst guaranteeing a leak-proof seal.

pipe-clamps.seo_p1: Pipe Clamps are fundamental hardware accessories in our catalogue, essential for securing piping networks securely to walls, ceilings, and support channels.
pipe-clamps.seo_p2: Constructed with a heavy-duty zinc-plated steel band, each clamp features a high-grade EPDM rubber inlay. This inlay not only grips the pipe firmly but also accommodates the natural thermal expansion of PP-R materials.
pipe-clamps.seo_p3: These clamps are universally used across all domestic, commercial, and industrial installations. By isolating the pipework from structural surfaces, they effectively dampen vibration and vastly reduce the transmission of acoustic noise.

backing-flange-pp-steel-sfbf.seo_p1: The Backing Flange PP-Steel (SF/BF) is a high-performance accessory designed to provide structural backing for flanged connections. It is a robust problem-solver within our transition range.
backing-flange-pp-steel-sfbf.seo_p2: This flange combines a rigid steel core fully encapsulated in a tough PP outer layer. This composite construction delivers the mechanical strength of metal alongside the total corrosion resistance of plastic.
backing-flange-pp-steel-sfbf.seo_p3: It is deployed whenever flanged adaptors are bolted to heavy-duty valves, pumps, or municipal infrastructure. The steel reinforcement prevents any warping or distortion under high torque, guaranteeing a perfectly flush, leak-free seal.

flat-gasket.seo_p1: Our standard Flat Gasket is a critical sealing accessory within our catalogue, explicitly designed for creating watertight seals in heavy-duty flanged connections.
flat-gasket.seo_p2: Precision-cut from premium EPDM elastomer, this gasket maintains its elasticity over a vast temperature spectrum and resists chemical degradation. It is perfectly dimensioned to align with the mating surfaces of our flange adaptors.
flat-gasket.seo_p3: It is an absolute necessity when bolting PP-R pipework to metallic valves, water meters, or pump flanges. The high-quality elastomer compresses uniformly, ensuring long-term pressure retention without the need for periodic re-tightening.

flat-gasket-for-unions-pp-r.seo_p1: The Flat Gasket for Unions (PP-R) is a specialised sealing component tailored for our demountable union fittings. It ensures a flawless seal every time a connection is made.
flat-gasket-for-unions-pp-r.seo_p2: Formulated from highly resilient EPDM rubber, this gasket features specific inner and outer diameters to match our PP-R union faces exactly. It withstands aggressive thermal cycling and high system pressures effortlessly.
flat-gasket-for-unions-pp-r.seo_p3: Installers rely on this gasket when assembling or reassembling pump connections and manifold valves. Its robust memory retention allows unions to be safely opened and resealed during routine maintenance without sacrificing watertight integrity.

plug.seo_p1: The threaded Plug is a simple yet indispensable accessory within our catalogue, engineered to cap off female-threaded connections securely and permanently.
plug.seo_p2: Moulded from solid PP-R, this threaded stopper features a precisely cut male thread that integrates perfectly with corresponding brass or plastic sockets. It provides the same formidable chemical and thermal resistance as the main piping system.
plug.seo_p3: It is heavily utilised during the construction phase to seal open pipe ends for pressure testing, or to close off unused manifold ports. Providing a completely secure, watertight seal, it protects the system from contamination until final fixtures are fitted.

pipe-cutter-2040.seo_p1: The Pipe Cutter 20–40 is a professional-grade hand tool specifically selected for our catalogue to ensure the flawless preparation of small to medium PP-R pipes.
pipe-cutter-2040.seo_p2: This compact shear features a high-leverage ratchet mechanism and a razor-sharp, hardened steel blade. It effortlessly slices through PP-R and PP-RCT materials up to 40 mm in diameter, yielding an absolutely clean, burr-free edge.
pipe-cutter-2040.seo_p3: It is an essential item in every installer's toolkit for domestic plumbing and heating jobs. Delivering perfectly square cuts is the critical first step to achieving a 100% secure socket fusion weld, eliminating the risk of internal blockages.

pipe-cutter-50125.seo_p1: Our Pipe Cutter 50–125 is a heavy-duty rotary cutting tool designed for large-dimension plastic pipes. It is a staple instrument for commercial and industrial pipeline installers.
pipe-cutter-50125.seo_p2: Built with a rugged, torsion-resistant frame, it utilises a high-carbon steel cutting wheel that traces the pipe circumference precisely. It effortlessly handles thick-walled SDR 6 and SDR 7.4 pipes up to 125 mm without deforming the tube profile.
pipe-cutter-50125.seo_p3: This tool is heavily deployed on major construction sites, district heating networks, and industrial plant installations. It guarantees a perfectly perpendicular cut on large pipes, which is an absolute prerequisite for successful electrofusion and butt welding.

pipe-cutter-50125-1.seo_p1: The Pipe Cutter 50–125 (1¼) is a robust, alternative configuration of our large-dimension rotary cutter, offering specialized grip and cutting dynamics for thick-walled polymers.
pipe-cutter-50125-1.seo_p2: Featuring an adjusted roller assembly and a heavy-duty cutting wheel, this variant provides enhanced stability on larger PP-R pipes. The ergonomic feed screw allows for micro-adjustments, ensuring the blade cleanly penetrates the material without causing micro-cracks.
pipe-cutter-50125-1.seo_p3: Highly favoured by industrial fabricators and municipal contractors, it ensures extreme precision when preparing mainlines for welding. The flawless, square cut it produces drastically reduces preparation time and guarantees optimal fusion surface contact.

hand-welding-machine-2032-complete-set.seo_p1: The Hand Welding Machine 20–32 (Complete Set) is the definitive starter kit in our tool catalogue, providing everything needed for professional socket fusion of smaller pipe dimensions.
hand-welding-machine-2032-complete-set.seo_p2: This compact, lightweight device features a microprocessor-controlled heating element that maintains a constant welding temperature of 260°C. The set includes premium, Teflon-coated heating mandrels and sockets for sizes 20 mm to 32 mm, all housed in a rugged metal case.
hand-welding-machine-2032-complete-set.seo_p3: It is the perfect system for residential plumbing, bathroom renovations, and confined-space installations. The rapid heat-up time and precise temperature control guarantee a homogeneous, leak-proof weld every single time, empowering installers with absolute confidence.

hand-welding-machine-2063-complete-set.seo_p1: Our Hand Welding Machine 20–63 (Complete Set) is a comprehensive, professional-grade fusion kit. It is the workhorse of our tool range, covering the vast majority of standard installation sizes.
hand-welding-machine-2063-complete-set.seo_p2: Built around a high-capacity, electronically regulated heating plate, this machine delivers unyielding thermal stability even in adverse ambient conditions. It comes fully equipped with high-quality, non-stick heating tools from 20 mm up to 63 mm.
hand-welding-machine-2063-complete-set.seo_p3: This set is universally utilised across commercial building sites and complex domestic installations. Whether welding a small basin supply or a substantial riser main, it provides the exact thermal energy required for a flawless molecular bond.

hand-welding-machine-mirror-50125.seo_p1: The Hand Welding Machine Mirror 50–125 is a powerful, large-format heating element designed for manual socket fusion of substantial pipe diameters.
hand-welding-machine-mirror-50125.seo_p2: This heavy-duty 'mirror' boasts a massive thermal mass and an exceptionally precise electronic thermostat. It provides the vast energy reserves necessary to thoroughly melt thick-walled PP-R pipes and fittings up to 125 mm, preventing cold joints.
hand-welding-machine-mirror-50125.seo_p3: It is an indispensable tool for industrial contractors and those constructing large-scale heating manifolds. Despite its power, it remains manageable for manual operation, offering a flexible, highly reliable alternative to fully automated bench welding machines.

welding-tool.seo_p1: The standard Welding Tool comprises the essential heating mandrel and socket pairs required for the thermal fusion process. It is a core consumable item within our professional tooling catalogue.
welding-tool.seo_p2: Precision-machined from high-grade aluminium, these inserts are coated with a premium, heavy-duty Teflon (PTFE) layer. This advanced coating prevents molten PP-R from adhering to the tool, ensuring an incredibly smooth, perfectly dimensioned fusion face.
welding-tool.seo_p3: Available in all standard pipe dimensions, these tools are continually swapped into our hand welding machines on busy construction sites. Their exceptional durability guarantees thousands of pristine welds, drastically reducing downtime and ensuring consistent, flawless pipeline joints.

welding-machine-50125-complete-set.seo_p1: The Welding Machine 50–125 (Complete Set) is our flagship bench-mounted fusion station, engineered specifically for the precision socket welding of large-diameter PP-R pipes.
welding-machine-50125-complete-set.seo_p2: This professional-grade machine features a highly stable clamping framework, a digitally controlled heating mirror, and a heavy-duty alignment track. It provides the immense mechanical force and thermal consistency required to fuse pipes and fittings up to 125 mm flawlessly.
welding-machine-50125-complete-set.seo_p3: It is the mandated equipment for fabricating large distribution headers, risers, and industrial pipe spools off-site. The bench-mounted design drastically reduces operator fatigue and completely eliminates the alignment errors common in manual large-scale welding.

butt-welding-machine-90250.seo_p1: Our Butt Welding Machine 90–250 is the ultimate heavy-duty joining solution in our catalogue, designed for the direct end-to-end fusion of massive PP-R and PP-RCT pipelines.
butt-welding-machine-90250.seo_p2: This sophisticated hydraulic machine incorporates a precision facing tool, a high-capacity PTFE-coated heating plate, and an automated pressure regulation system. It effortlessly manages the immense clamping forces necessary to butt-weld pipes up to 250 mm.
butt-welding-machine-90250.seo_p3: Exclusively utilised for district heating networks, municipal water mains, and large-scale industrial fluid transport. Butt fusion eliminates the need for socket fittings on long straight runs, significantly reducing material costs and ensuring a completely smooth internal bore.

electrofusion-machine.seo_p1: The Electrofusion Machine is a state-of-the-art, computerised control unit designed to power our advanced electrofusion fittings. It is a highly intelligent addition to our tooling catalogue.
electrofusion-machine.seo_p2: Encased in a rugged, site-ready housing, this device features an integrated barcode scanner that automatically reads the specific fusion parameters of each fitting. It continuously monitors the ambient temperature and adjusts the energy output to guarantee a perfect weld.
electrofusion-machine.seo_p3: This machine is essential when executing complex repairs, working in highly confined trenches, or joining large-dimension pipes where manual manipulation is impossible. It provides a fully documented, completely reliable fusion process with minimal operator intervention.

welding-tool-for-weld-in-saddles.seo_p1: The Welding Tool for Weld-in Saddles is a highly specialised heating element, exclusively designed for our saddle branching system. It is a crucial component in our professional tool range.
welding-tool-for-weld-in-saddles.seo_p2: Coated with premium Teflon, this uniquely shaped tool features a concave heating face to melt the exterior wall of the main pipe, and a convex mandrel to heat the saddle fitting simultaneously. It ensures a perfectly contoured, even melt on both surfaces.
welding-tool-for-weld-in-saddles.seo_p3: It is absolutely vital for installers looking to tap into existing distribution mains rapidly and securely. By providing the exact geometry required for saddle fusion, it guarantees a joint that is as strong and leak-proof as a standard tee.

drilling-tool-for-weld-in-saddle.seo_p1: Our Drilling Tool for Weld-in Saddle is a precision cutting instrument designed to work in tandem with our saddle welding process. It is a fundamental accessory for pipeline modifications.
drilling-tool-for-weld-in-saddle.seo_p2: Manufactured from high-speed steel, this custom-designed core drill neatly penetrates the wall of the main pipe only after the saddle has been successfully welded. It produces a clean, perfectly circular hole without generating excessive swarf.
drilling-tool-for-weld-in-saddle.seo_p3: This tool is essential for commissioning new branch lines off a live, albeit depressurised, primary main. The clean cut it produces ensures unrestricted fluid flow into the new branch, preventing turbulence and maintaining overall system efficiency.

welding-tool-for-repairing-plug.seo_p1: The Welding Tool for Repairing Plug is an emergency maintenance instrument, specifically designed to seal accidental punctures in PP-R pipework quickly and effectively.
welding-tool-for-repairing-plug.seo_p2: This compact, Teflon-coated heating element features a precisely tapered profile. It is engineered to simultaneously melt the inner wall of the puncture hole and the outer surface of the corresponding repair plug, ensuring a perfectly matched fusion zone.
welding-tool-for-repairing-plug.seo_p3: Building managers and maintenance crews rely heavily on this tool to fix drill-hole damage without having to cut out and replace entire pipe sections. It provides a permanent, high-pressure repair that restores the system's integrity in minutes.

repairing-plug.seo_p1: The Repairing Plug is a vital emergency consumable within our catalogue, designed to work seamlessly with our specialised repair welding tool to seal pipe punctures.
repairing-plug.seo_p2: Moulded from solid, high-grade PP-R, this tapered plug exactly matches the geometry of the repair heating tool. Once fused into the damaged pipe wall, it bonds at the molecular level, completely restoring the original pressure rating of the pipeline.
repairing-plug.seo_p3: It is the definitive solution for accidental damage caused during subsequent building works, such as drilling into concealed pipes. Using this plug avoids massive disruption, saving significant time and expense compared to traditional repair methods.

pipes.areas: Drinking water installation, heating systems, HVAC, industrial plants, shipbuilding
pipes.advTitle: Superior Piping Technology for Every Project
advList: No corrosion: 100% resistant to pitting and rust.
Low pressure loss: The extremely smooth inner surface minimizes friction and saves pump energy.
Long lifespan: Guaranteed maintenance-free for over 50 years of continuous use.
Noise reduction: Excellent sound insulation against flow noise.
Hygienic: Meets strictest international drinking water standards (DVGW, KIWA).
pipes.seoText: Our high-performance pipes are manufactured in Waldsolms to the highest quality standards. The material combination of PP-R and PP-RCT provides exceptional temperature and pressure resistance. Whether in building technology, industrial plant engineering, or complex cooling systems, this piping system delivers maximum safety and efficiency. The simple and secure welding technology guarantees absolutely leak-free connections.

fittings.areas: Drinking water networks, sanitary installations, industrial distribution, heating
advList: Homogeneous fusion: Pipe and fitting melt into an inseparable unit.
No gaskets needed: The permanent connection requires no error-prone O-rings.
Easy installation: Fast and secure processing on site.
Full flow: No cross-section reduction, preserving system pressure.
Chemical resistance: Resistant to a wide range of aggressive media.
fittings.seoText: K-Aqua fittings are the vital link for reliable pipe networks. Manufactured in Germany, these fittings offer the highest precision and dimensional accuracy. The socket welding technique takes only seconds and cools to a connection that is as strong as the pipe itself. This eliminates the risk of micro-leaks that often occur with press or push-fit systems after years of use.

valves.areas: Branch shut-off, system control, distribution manifolds, industry
advList: Maintenance-free: The mechanics are designed for decades of smooth operation.
Full bore: Ball valves with full cross-section minimize pressure losses.
Easy integration: Can be welded directly into the PP-R system.
High-quality materials: Valve seats and balls made of corrosion-resistant alloys.
Secure shut-off: 100% tight even under extreme pressure and temperature changes.
valves.seoText: K-Aqua shut-off valves and fittings combine proven PP-R welding technology with high-quality mechanical components. They enable precise control of fluids and secure isolation of network sections for maintenance. Every valve undergoes strict pressure testing before delivery to ensure maximum operational safety in critical applications.

fallback.areas: Universal installation technology, construction site supplies, system completion
advList: tested quality: Complies with the ISO 9001 management system.
System compatibility: Perfectly matched to the K-Aqua piping system.
Durability: Robust materials for harsh construction site conditions.
Safe application: Guaranteed function when used professionally.
Economy: Excellent price-performance ratio.
fallback.seoText: As a system provider, K-Aqua supplies not only pipes and fittings but also all necessary tools and accessories. From high-precision welding machines to reliable pipe cutters, our tools guarantee standard-compliant processing and maximum installation security. Rely on original accessories to maintain the warranty of your entire K-Aqua system.

tools.metaDesc: K-Aqua Tools & Accessories – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects.
tools.heroDesc: This module delivers uncompromising safety for the most demanding projects worldwide. Manufactured to the strictest industry standards to last for generations. Where material failure is not an option.
tools.bentoLead: When international general contractors plan billion-dollar projects, they do not rely on promises, but on hard facts and high-precision equipment.
tools.bento1Desc: For dimensions 20 mm to 125 mm. Compact, robust design for tough construction site use.
tools.bento2Desc: Ergonomic designs for fatigue-free work and perfect 90° cuts.
tools.bento3Desc: For nominal diameters up to 250 mm. CNC-controlled for absolute repeatability.
tools.bento4Desc: Drill heads, repair saddles and hole saws for subsequent branches.
tools.scrollLead: Discover the technological details that make our tools the first choice for tested installers.
tools.scroll1Desc: Our heating element socket welding devices are equipped with high-precision, Teflon-coated heating mandrels and heating bushes. The microprocessor-controlled temperature regulation guarantees a constant welding temperature of 260°C – even in extreme outside temperatures on global construction sites. This creates an inseparable, homogeneous connection at the molecular level.
tools.scroll2Desc: For large nominal diameters (up to 250 mm and more) we rely on CNC-controlled butt welding machines. Automatic pressure and time calculation eliminate human error. Each welding cycle is digitally logged to ensure complete traceability for building acceptance. German Engineering at the highest level.
tools.scroll3Title: Precision pipe peelers. Accurate to the millimetre.
tools.scroll3Desc: Preparation is 80% of the weld. Our mechanical and electrical pipe peelers remove the oxide layer from K-Aqua pipes with an absolutely uniform cutting depth. This prevents micro-cracks and creates a perfect fusion plane. A tool that will last for generations.
tools.scroll4Title: Cold circular saws for exact cuts.
tools.scroll4Desc: Pipe shears can deform the material. Our industrial cold circular saws guarantee perfectly right-angled, burr-free cuts. The result: No stress-induced cracks, no pressure loss, absolute plane parallelism before the welding process.
tools.timelineDesc: From cutting to molecular fusion. A standardised process that leads to 100% leak-proof and maintenance-free pipe systems.
tools.timeline1Text: A burr-free, 90-degree cut is the foundation of any permanent connection. Our precision cutters and cold circular saws guarantee an absolutely flat surface without microstructural deformation of the polypropylene.
tools.timeline2Text: Before welding, the pipe is exactly calibrated and the outer oxide layer is removed to the millimetre using our special peeling tools. This enables a 100% pure surface for the fusion process.
tools.timeline3Text: Pipe and fitting are simultaneously heated to exactly 260°C on the Teflon-coated heating matrix. The microprocessor-controlled thermostat of the K-Aqua welding devices keeps the temperature constant – regardless of wind or weather.
tools.timeline4Text: Within the specified changeover time, the heated components are joined together without twisting. After the cooling phase, a new, absolutely homogeneous workpiece is created. Maintenance-free for over 50 years.
tools.specsTitle:
Industrial Authority.
Down to the detail.
tools.specsP1: For decades, we have been combining craftsmanship pride with state-of-the-art, highly automated manufacturing technology in our main plant in the heart of Germany.
tools.specsP2: In use in the harshest deserts and most extreme climates in the world, our material proves itself anew every day. We set the standard that the rest of the world follows.
tools.ctaDesc: Talk to our engineering team about your next megaproject and request samples of our tools.

hero.title: Welding Tools for PP-R Installation
hero.lead: Socket fusion machines, electrofusion technology and calibration tools: K-Aqua original tools deliver standard-compliant, permanently tight welded joints on every site.

valves.metaDesc: K-Aqua Valves & Fittings – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects. Explore technical perfection.
valves.heroDesc: Welcome to the premier league of fluid technology. K-Aqua valves and fittings are not simply components – they are the incorruptible heart of global infrastructure. Built to last forever.
valves.manifestoTitle:
When the material yields, the system breaks.
We do not yield.
valves.manifestoP1: In industrial fluid engineering, a valve is never just a switch for liquids. It is the critical junction where kinetic energy, extreme pressure, thermal expansion, and chemical aggressiveness collide.
valves.manifestoP2: This is where banal mass-produced goods separate from true engineering art. Our valves are massively over-engineered, manufactured with paranoid precision, and built for scenarios that other manufacturers would call "impossible". This is what we understand by German Engineering.
valves.scrollTitle: From raw material to an indestructible valve.
valves.scrollLead: Accompany the creation process of a K-Aqua valve. An uncompromising path through heat, pressure, and microscopic precision.
valves.scroll1Desc: Our valves and fittings begin their existence as pure, industrially tested high-performance material. Through strict spectral analytical investigations, we guarantee even before the first milling head is used that there are absolutely no microstructural weak points. This is the non-negotiable foundation for the later absolute corrosion resistance and mechanical integrity in years of continuous use.
valves.scroll2Desc: Every single component is manufactured from solid material in our factory on state-of-the-art 5-axis CNC machining centres with an absurd tolerance of less than a thousandth of a millimetre. This uncompromising precision ensures that sealing surfaces lie perfectly on top of each other. It completely eliminates leakage risks and guarantees absolutely smooth, silky-soft, and wear-free operation – even after decades.
valves.scroll3Desc: A valve is only as good as its internal flow profile. Using advanced computational fluid dynamics (CFD), we have designed the internal contours so that turbulence and cavitation are virtually eliminated. This means less pressure loss in the overall system and absolute noise minimisation even at the highest flow velocities.
valves.scroll4Desc: Random samples are not enough when billion-dollar infrastructures are at stake. Before a valve leaves the K-Aqua factory, it is subjected to a fully automated, robotic test cycle that exceeds real loads many times over. Hydraulic high-pressure tests, helium vacuum leak tests, and thermal shock tests guarantee our legendary zero-defect rate.
valves.showcaseTitle:
No weak points.
No blind spots.
valves.showcaseP1: The internal architecture of our valves is consistently trimmed for zero dead space. Stagnation zones where bacteria such as legionella could multiply are geometrically eliminated.
valves.showcaseP2: The water shoots through the valve body in a perfectly guided laminar flow. The solid sealing seats are self-cleaning and close hermetically even after the millionth cycle.
valves.showcaseList1: tested drinking water hygiene according to highest standards
valves.showcaseList2: Hermetic sealing at maximum operating pressure
valves.showcaseList3: Maintenance-free spindle seals with double O-ring
valves.bentoLead: When marketing phrases end, the data speaks. Discover the technical parameters that make our valves the ultimate choice for megaprojects.
valves.bento1Desc: Developed for continuous high-pressure applications beyond the norm. The wall thicknesses and thread designs are so massively dimensioned that they do not yield in the slightest, even with extreme pressure peaks and water hammer. A monolithic block of safety.
valves.bento2Desc: From icy cold to boiling flow temperatures. The high-end material retains its full elasticity, does not become brittle, and resists thermal expansion extremely effectively.
valves.bento3Desc: Corrosion is a concept from the past. Our valves are immune to aggressive soil conditions, hard water, and chlorine-containing disinfection measures. No rusting, no pitting.
valves.bento4Desc: Design meets raw functionality. The solid handwheels, massive levers, and precisely crafted spindles provide immediate, tactile, and absolutely precise feedback when closing and opening, even with heavy protective gloves.
valves.timelineLead: A timeline of uncompromising quality assurance. How an idea becomes an industrial legend.
valves.timeline1Text: Selection of metallic alloys and high-performance polymers specifically formulated for K-Aqua. We rely on absolute creep resistance and maximum molecular stability.
valves.timeline2Text: Using supercomputers, the inner flow channels are calculated in thousands of iterations to minimise flow resistance to zero.
valves.timeline3Text: Prototypes undergo months of endurance tests in our climate chambers at up to 120°C, 25 bar pressure, and extreme chemical solutions.
valves.timeline4Text: The transfer to our highly automated Industry 4.0 production line. We achieve maximum reproducibility with minimal tolerances without human sources of error.
valves.timeline5Text: Deployment on the most critical construction sites in the world - from desert megaprojects to offshore facilities. Accompanied by our field engineering team.
valves.finalTitle:
Build for generations.
Not for the next maintenance interval.
valves.finalDesc: In a world that increasingly relies on rapid obsolescence and cheap replacement products, we stand as a steely counterpole. A K-Aqua valve is installed – and then forgotten. Because it simply works. Decade after decade. Trust in true industrial authority.
valves.ctaDesc: Talk to our chief engineers about the specifications of your next megaproject. We deliver the solutions for problems that others have not even understood yet.
