meta.title: Fittings & Form Parts | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Fittings & Form Parts – Uncompromising safety through German Engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.title: PP-R Fittings & Molded Parts for Permanently Tight Joints
hero.lead: From elbows to reducers: K-Aqua PP-R fittings fuse molecularly with the pipe during welding — a homogeneous system with no gaskets and no weak points.

intro.title: Safety is no coincidence. It is calculable.
intro.lead: When international general contractors plan billion-dollar projects, they don't trust promises, but hard facts. We set the standard that the rest of the world follows.
intro.text1: For decades, we have been combining pride in craftsmanship with state-of-the-art, highly automated manufacturing technology at our main plant in the heart of Germany. Every elbow, every socket, every T-piece carries the unmistakable DNA of German engineering. Deployed in the harshest deserts, the most extreme climate zones, and the most demanding industrial facilities in the world, our material proves itself anew every day.
intro.text2: The fusion of macromolecules in our PP-R system creates a pipeline network without weak points. There are no sealing rings that can corrode, no glued joints that can be attacked by chemicals. The pipe and the fitting are thermally fused into a single, inseparable workpiece. This is the absolute definition of safety.

sticky.title: The Anatomy of Reliability.
sticky.lead: A deep dive into the physical and chemical properties that make our fittings the global benchmark.

items.title: The molecular structure
items.desc: Our fittings are based on a highly cross-linked PP-R polypropylene random copolymer. Through controlled temperature-pressure profiles during extrusion, we achieve an isotropic crystal structure. The result: Unprecedented resistance to stress cracks and extreme temperature fluctuations.

items.title: Thermoplastic Precision
items.desc: Every moulded part undergoes a thermoplastic injection moulding process with cavity tolerances in the micrometre range. This ensures that the melt indices when welding with our pipes are absolutely identical – for a homogeneous, inseparable, and 100% leak-free material connection.

items.title: Zero-Defect Tolerance
items.desc: We leave nothing to chance. Using ultrasonic wall thickness measurement, hydrostatic internal pressure creep tests, and DSC (Differential Scanning Calorimetry), every batch is analysed. Only material that exceeds our internal standards – which are far above DIN EN ISO 15874 – is released.

items.title: Cavitation Resistance
items.desc: The flow-optimised internal geometry of our fittings effectively prevents pressure drops and cavitation, even at extreme flow velocities in industrial risers. This minimises noise emissions and protects the system from abrasive wear from the inside.

bento.title: Specifications beyond the standard.
bento.lead: While the industry considers norms as a target, we see them merely as the absolute minimum.

items.title: DIN EN ISO 15874
items.desc: Full compliance and certification for plastic piping systems for hot and cold water installations.

items.title: PN 20 / PN 25
items.desc: Designed for permanent high-pressure loads even at critical temperatures.

items.title: Chemical Inertness
items.desc: Outstanding resistance to aggressive media. pH-independent (pH 1 to 14) for industrial use.

items.title: Acoustic Damping
items.desc: The inherent elasticity of the PP-R material absorbs structure-borne noise and reduces flow noise to an absolute minimum, ideal for luxury hotels and hospitals.

timeline.title: The Genesis Process
timeline.desc: From the molecular raw mass to the indestructible component. A look into our highly automated manufacturing matrix.

items.title: Granulate Selection
items.text: Only high-purity, pre-synthesized polypropylene granulate from premium European refineries passes our incoming goods inspection.

items.title: Thermal Conditioning
items.text: Before injection molding, the granulate is thermally stabilized to eliminate residual moisture and guarantee a homogeneous melt.

items.title: High-Pressure Injection Molding
items.text: In fully automated, robot-assisted injection molding cells, we shape the material under enormous pressure into flawless fittings.

items.title: Cooling Matrix
items.text: A computer-controlled cooling profile prevents internal stresses in the material and ensures perfect dimensional stability.

items.title: Certification & Logistics
items.text: Every batch receives its digital certificate. Ready for dispatch to the most demanding construction sites in the world.

depth.title: Lifespan > 50 Years. Guaranteed.
depth.text: Time is the ultimate stress test for any material. Our fittings are designed to outlast the lifespan of the building itself. By adding special antioxidants and thermal stabilizers to our PP-R matrix, thermal-oxidative aging is massively delayed. Even at continuous flow temperatures of 70°C and pressure loads of 10 bar, we guarantee a service life of over half a century. That is not marketing. That is applied polymer physics.

cta.title: Ready for uncompromising quality?
cta.desc: Connect with our engineering team. We don't just deliver products, we deliver security for your next megaproject.

meta.title: PP-R & PP-RCT pipe systems | K-Aqua
meta.desc: High-performance pipe systems made of PP-R and PP-RCT. German engineering for drinking water, climate and industry. Uncompromising security for megaprojects.

hero.title: PP-R & PP-RCT Pipes from d20 to d630
hero.lead: K-Aqua PP-R pipes and PP-RCT multilayer pipes for drinking water, heating and industry: mono and fiber-composite versions in every pressure class — made in Germany to DIN 8077/8078.

sticky.title: Polymer engineering to perfection.
sticky.lead: The molecular structure of our PP-R and PP-RCT pipes has been optimized for extreme thermomechanical loads. A masterpiece of German engineering.

items.title: PP-RCT multilayer architecture
items.desc: Our latest generation PP-RCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymers with modified Crystallinity and Temperature resistance) pipes have an integrated glass fiber compound layer. This reduces the thermal linear expansion by up to 75% compared to standard PP-R pipes, while the pressure resistance at high temperatures is drastically increased. The result is thinner wall thicknesses with increased flow capacity.

items.title: Homogeneous welding
items.desc: In contrast to press fittings or adhesive connections, we use the polyfusion welding process. Pipe and fitting fuse at 260°C to form a single, inseparable molecular unit. The system works completely without O-rings or mechanical seals. The connection point is physically stronger than the pipe itself - a 100% leak-free service life is guaranteed.

items.title: Absolute freedom from corrosion
items.desc: Metallic systems capitulate to aggressive water qualities, low pH values ​​or high chloride contents. K-Aqua polymer pipes are completely inert. Pitting, crevice corrosion, galvanic corrosion or incrustations are physically impossible. The pipe friction loss (roughness value k=0.007 mm) remains at the same level as the first day even after 50 years of operation, which massively reduces the pump energy.

items.title: Thermal and acoustic insulation
items.desc: Thanks to the low thermal conductivity of PP-R (0.24 W/mK) compared to steel (50 W/mK) or copper (380 W/mK), the formation of condensation in cooling systems is greatly delayed and heat losses in heating systems are minimized. In addition, our thick-walled polymer pipes efficiently absorb flow noise and water hammers, perfecting the acoustic comfort in high-rise buildings and hotels.

timeline.title: Zero error tolerance
timeline.desc: Every centimeter of our pipes is monitored during the extrusion process. From the granulate to the finished product – quality Made in Germany.

items.title: Premium raw material
items.text: We only process high-purity PP-R and PP-RCT granules from the world's leading polymer manufacturers. Each batch undergoes an MFR test (melt flow rate) and an oxidative induction time measurement (OIT) in our in-house laboratory before being released for extrusion.

items.title: Precision extrusion
items.text: Our state-of-the-art extrusion systems produce 3-layer fibre composite pipes with micrometre precision. Ultrasonic wall thickness measurement in real time over 360° ensures that even with SDR 6 pipes the minimum permissible tolerances are not met.

items.title: Thermal conditioning
items.text: Immediately after extrusion, the pipes are gradually cooled down in specially tempered water baths. This gentle cooling process prevents internal stresses in the material and ensures maximum dimensional stability across all dimensions.

items.title: 100% traceability
items.text: Each tube receives an indelible laser imprint with exact batch and production time information. Even after decades in the wall, the origin of every K-Aqua pipe can be completely traced back to the granulate batch.

items.title: Certification & Release
items.text: Hydraulic burst pressure test at 95°C for 1000 hours. Tensile tests, notched impact strength and toxicological safety testing. Only if the product exceeds all standards (DIN 8077/8078, EN ISO 15874) does it leave our workshop.

bento.title: A dimension for every requirement.
bento.lead: Scalable from d20 house connections to d500 industrial risers. Our system grows with the dimensions of your project.

items.title: Dimensions from d20 to d500
items.desc: Complete portfolio of pipes and fittings. No matter whether T-pieces, reductions or flange connections in gigantic dimensions – we supply the complete system from a single source. No compromises when it comes to hydraulics.

items.title: SDR grades 6 to 11
items.desc: Tailored pressure levels (PN10 to PN25) through various standard dimension ratios. Optimise material usage and flow.

items.title: Drinking water hygiene
items.desc: Complies with the strictest European standards (UBA, DVGW). Absolutely food-safe, tasteless and odourless. Optional antibacterial interior coating.

items.title: UV-resistant outer tubes
items.desc: We offer special UV-stabilised pipes for outdoor installations in extreme climate zones (e.g. Middle East). The protective outer layer blocks UV radiation and prevents polymer degradation.

cta.title: Let experts size your project.
cta.desc: Send us your isometrics or P&ID plans. Our engineering team takes care of the hydraulic calculation and bill of materials creation for your large project.

meta.title: Transition Fittings | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Transition Fittings – hybrid connectivity of the absolute highest class. Where high-strength metal meets innovative plastic. German Engineering.

hero.title: Transition Fittings: Safely from Metal to PP-R
hero.lead: Brass meets polymer: K-Aqua transition fittings connect existing metal pipework to the PP-R system permanently tight and corrosion-free — tested far beyond the standard.

intro.title: Where worlds collide.
intro.lead: The transition from rigid metallic piping systems to modern thermoplastic networks is the Achilles heel of any building and industrial installation. This is where maximum thermal and mechanical shear forces act.

sticky.title: Anatomy of indestructibility.
sticky.lead: We consider a transition fitting not as an accessory, but as a highly complex mechanical instrument. Every millimetre of wall thickness, every thread is the result of countless finite element analyses (FEA).

items.title: The symbiosis of metal and polymer
items.desc: Our transition fittings combine the relentless mechanical strength of dezincification-resistant CW617N brass with the chemical inertness of PP-RCT. This material fusion is not created by simple pressing, but by a thermomechanical injection moulding process that achieves an inseparable molecular interlocking.

items.title: Extreme torsion and torque
items.desc: A critical failure criterion for standard fittings is torque overload during installation. K-Aqua transition fittings integrate a patented hexagonal anchoring profile in the polymer jacket. The result: over 300 Nm guaranteed torsional resistance without delamination of the boundary layer.

items.title: Thermal expansion coefficients in balance
items.desc: Metals and plastics expand differently with temperature fluctuations (Δα). Through precisely calculated micro-expansion joints in the brass insert, our fittings compensate for extreme shocks from -20°C to +95°C in milliseconds – absolutely leak-free.

items.title: Zero-tolerance quality control
items.desc: Jedes einzelne Hybrid-Bauteil durchläuft einen vollautomatisierten Helium-Leckagetest und eine optische 3D-Vermessung. Wenn der Grenzwert von 10^-5 mbar·l/s auch nur ansatzweise tangiert wird, schließt unsere Anlage das Teil rigoros aus. German Engineering duldet keine Kompromisse.

bento.title: Architektur der Leistung.
bento.lead: Wenn Sie Megaprojekte mit zehntausenden Verbindungen planen, ist statistische Ausfallsicherheit der wichtigste ROI. K-Aqua liefert Ihnen die physikalische Garantie dafür.

items.title: DZR Brass Core
items.desc: Entzinkungsbeständiges Messing der Güteklasse CW617N (nach DIN EN 12164) eliminiert das Risiko von selektiver Korrosion in aggressiven Wasserqualitäten.

items.title: Anti-Rotation Design
items.desc: Polygonale Hinterschneidungen formen einen geometrischen Lock, der extreme Anzugsmomente aufnimmt, ohne den Kunststoffmantel zu belasten.

items.title: Tiefgezogenes Gewinde
items.desc: Konische und zylindrische ISO 7/1 bzw. ISO 228 Gewinde, maschinell mit einer Toleranz von ±0.01mm geschnitten für perfekte Dichtigkeit.

items.title: PP-RCT Matrix
items.desc: Die hochkristalline Struktur unseres Polypropylen Random-Copolymers bietet überragende Langzeit-Zeitstandfestigkeit bei hohen Temperaturen.

timeline.title: Der Fertigungszyklus
timeline.desc: Ein Blick in unsere Manufaktur. Der Weg vom Rohmaterial zum geprüften Hybrid-Fitting ist ein Orchester aus Hitze, Druck und gnadenloser Präzision.

items.title: Rohteilbearbeitung (CW617N)
items.text: Das Messing wird bei 750°C in hochpräzise Matrizen gepresst, gefolgt von einer CNC-gesteuerten Zerspanung im Mikrometerbereich zur Erzeugung des Dichtprofils.

items.title: Oberflächenpassivierung
items.text: Um galvanische Korrosion zu eliminieren, durchlaufen die Gewindeeinsätze einen mehrstufigen Passivierungsprozess in elektrolytischen Ultraschallbädern.

items.title: Umspritzen (Injection Molding)
items.text: In Hochdruck-Spritzgussmaschinen (2.000 bar) umschließt das schmelzflüssige PP-RCT das Messing. Der Kunststoff füllt jede Hinterschneidung komplett aus.

items.title: Kontrollierte Abkühlung
items.text: Ein programmierter, stufenweiser Temperaturabbau verhindert Eigenspannungen im Kunststoffgitter und sichert die konzentrische Formtreue des Fittings.

items.title: Druck- & Torsionsprüfung
items.text: Stichprobenartige Bersttests bis zu 120 bar sowie Dauerschwingversuche simulieren 50 Jahre aggressivste industrielle Dauerbelastung.

stats.title: Harte Fakten.
stats.lead: Wir testen nicht nur nach Norm. Wir definieren sie. Unsere internen Prüfprotokolle überschreiten die Anforderungen von DVGW, SKZ und ISO um bis zu 300%.

cta.title: Die stärkste Verbindung Ihres Projekts.
cta.desc: Verlassen Sie sich auf bewährte deutsche Ingenieurskunst. Kontaktieren Sie uns für technische Datenblätter, BIM-Modelle oder eine individuelle Projektberatung.

hero.desc: Precision at the molecular level. Designed to last. Our pipe systems, fittings and valves define the global standard for industrial and civil water infrastructure. No compromises. Just pure performance.

sticky.title: UNCOMPROMISING ENGINEERING.
sticky.lead: Every component is part of a closed, perfect system. From inlet to end point, we control the flow of water, chemicals and gases with relentless reliability.

items.title: PPR PIPING SYSTEMS: INDESTRUCTIBLE VEINS
items.desc: The K-Aqua PPR system (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) is the backbone of modern liquid transport. Thermally fused into a homogeneous unit, it resists extreme pressures, chemical attacks and thermal stress. A system that doesn't leak, doesn't corrode and lasts for decades.

items.title: FITTINGS: GEOMETRIC PERFECTION
items.desc: Every K-Aqua fitting is a masterpiece of fluid mechanics. Reduced cavitation, optimized wall thicknesses and exact tolerances in the micrometer range guarantee minimal pressure losses and maximum system safety. We don't leave the river to chance.

items.title: VALVES & FITTINGS: ABSOLUTE CONTROL
items.desc: Industrial isolation and control technology that operates under the harshest conditions worldwide. Our ball valves, angle seat valves and backflow preventers are tested for tens of thousands of cycles without any loss of performance. Maximum tightness under maximum load.

items.title: COMPOSITE PIPES: THE SYNERGY OF MATERIALS
items.desc: Aluminum meets high-performance polymer. The K-Aqua multilayer composite pipes combine the mechanical stability of metal with the flexibility and chemical resistance of plastic. 100% oxygen tight. Minimum linear expansion. The ultimate solution for complex HVAC systems.

bento.title: TECHNOLOGICAL SUPERIORITY. DATA-DRIVEN.
bento.lead: K-Aqua systems are not just pipes – they are high-performance networks for liquids. Developed according to the strictest German industry standards.

items.title: Thermal fusion
items.desc: Homogeneous weld seams. The material becomes one. No glue, no sealing rings to fail. 100% security against leakage on a molecular basis.

items.title: Corrosion immunity
items.desc: Completely resistant to pitting, rust and electrochemical corrosion. The transported medium remains in its purest state.

items.title: Flow optimization
items.desc: Smooth wall technology (roughness 0.007 mm) with minimal coefficient of friction prevents deposits and massively minimizes pressure loss.

items.title: Pressure resistance PN25+
items.desc: Designed for maximum use in high-rise buildings, industrial facilities and critical infrastructure. Designed for trouble-free operation for over 50 years.

timeline.title: THE INSTALLATION PROCESS. REDEFINED.
timeline.desc: Faster. Safer. Cleaner. Our system dramatically reduces installation time while keeping sources of error to a minimum. A chronology of efficiency.

items.title: PLANNING & DIMENSIONING
items.text: Exact hydraulic calculation and design of the pipe diameters. Avoidance of oversizing through superior flow properties.

items.title: CUTTING & PREPARATION
items.text: Cold and chip-free cutting of pipes. Absolutely clean cut edges guarantee perfect welding preparation without risk of contamination.

items.title: HEATING ELEMENT SOCKET WELDING
items.text: The tool heats the pipe and fitting to exactly 260°C. In seconds, a molecular connection is created that cannot be broken.

items.title: PRESSURE TEST & ACCEPTANCE
items.text: The system is placed under extreme test pressure. No tolerance for leaks. K-Aqua delivers 100% safety from the first drop.

items.title: OPERATION FOR DECADES
items.text: Maintenance free. Low noise. The system works behind the scenes of the world's most modern buildings with unrelenting reliability.

products.sysLead: The foundation of our catalog – four pillars of system integration.

solutions.lead: Why polypropylene is the right material for tomorrow’s water supply — ecologically, technically and economically.

benefits.d: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be burned off uselessly — drastically reducing air pollution. Production uses water in a closed cooling loop, protecting rivers, streams and lakes.
PP carries recycling code "5" and can be separated by type. We recycle all production waste and offcuts — amid high demand for PP recyclate.
As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids — and injection-moulds complex geometries at low cost and high volume.
PP products last significantly longer than comparable materials: low-maintenance, wear-resistant and stable against ageing and temperature extremes.

solutions.nextLead: See how these material benefits become concrete in the K-Aqua product range.

items.title: Legionella prevention at the molecular level
items.desc: In critical hospital infrastructure, water hygiene is not an option, but a question of survival. Our K-Aqua pipe systems use extremely smooth, pore-free internal surfaces that physically prevent the formation of biofilms and the proliferation of Legionella. German engineering here means: prevention through perfect materials science, not through chemical post-treatment.

items.title: Thermal disinfection without material fatigue
items.desc: Clinical standards require regular thermal disinfection at temperatures above 70°C. While conventional systems age quickly, the K-Aqua PPR system is designed to withstand extreme thermal loads over decades. No microcracks, no brittleness, no compromises.

items.title: Absolutely sterile connections
items.desc: Our patented heating element socket welding fuses pipe and fitting into a homogeneous, completely seamless unit. There are no dead spaces in which stagnant water could collect. The result is a pipe system made from one piece - the absolute physical barrier against contamination.

items.title: Acoustic isolation for intensive care units
items.desc: Noise is a massive stress factor for patients and medical staff. The K-Aqua system has inherent sound-absorbing properties. Flow noises and pressure surges are absorbed by the material itself, which guarantees a whisper-quiet water supply even in high-pressure applications - essential for operating rooms and intensive care units.

items.title: System sizing & hydraulics
items.text: Precise calculation of the cable cross-sections to avoid stagnation zones. Every millimeter of pressure loss is simulated and eliminated by our German engineers on the digital twin during the planning phase.

items.title: Material specification
items.text: Selection of specific K-Aqua polymer blends, optimized for clinical requirements. Our raw materials go through 42 quality assurance steps before they even reach the extruder.

items.title: Prefabrication & cleanroom handling
items.text: Pre-assembly of complex distributors in controlled environments. Minimizing weld seams on the construction site guarantees up to 40% faster, error-free installation under clean room conditions.

We solve this paradox through pure, uncompromising German engineering.

textSection.title: Die Ingenieurskunst hinter der Stille
textSection.p1: In Wolkenkratzern und weitläufigen Resort-Anlagen herrschen extreme physikalische Bedingungen. Wasserdruck, der hunderte Meter in die Höhe gepumpt wird. Temperaturdifferenzen, die traditionelle Materialien an ihre Belastungsgrenzen bringen.
textSection.p2: Traditionelle Kupfersysteme weisen bei hohen Fließgeschwindigkeiten signifikante Erosionserscheinungen auf. Die Kavitation, verursacht durch Druckschwankungen in Steigleitungen von Hochhaushotels, führt unweigerlich zu Mikrorissen, Lochfraß und letztlich zu katastrophalen Wasserschäden, die ganze Etagen lahmlegen können. Für einen Hotelbetreiber bedeutet dies nicht nur massive Sanierungskosten, sondern einen irreparablen Reputationsverlust.
textSection.p3: K-Aqua geht einen radikal anderen Weg.
textSection.p4: Unsere Systeme basieren auf Polypropylen Random-Copolymerisat (PP-R) der neuesten Generation. Durch einen hochkomplexen Extrusionsprozess in unserem deutschen Stammwerk richten wir die Polymerketten so aus, dass sie eine beispiellose Kombination aus Flexibilität und extremer Druckresistenz aufweisen. Wenn es im System zu Druckschlägen (Water Hammer) kommt, fängt das Material diese kinetische Energie elastisch ab, anstatt sie als akustischen Schock oder mechanischen Riss an die Bausubstanz weiterzugeben.
textSection.h3: Homogene Schweißverbindungen: Das Ende der Leckage
textSection.p5: Das schwächste Glied in jedem Rohrleitungssystem ist die Verbindung. Gewinde korrodieren, Dichtungsringe werden porös, Klebeverbindungen ermüden durch thermische Zyklisierung.
textSection.p6: Wir nutzen das Prinzip der molekularen Fusion. Rohr und Fitting werden thermisch auf exakt 260°C erhitzt und anschließend zusammengefügt. Innerhalb von Sekundenbruchteilen verschmelzen die Polymerketten beider Bauteile zu einer unzertrennlichen, monolithischen Einheit. Das Resultat: Es gibt keine "Verbindung" mehr. Rohr und Fitting sind ein einziges, durchgehendes Stück Material. Ohne Dichtung, ohne Schwachstelle, mit einer Ausfallsicherheit von 100%.

items.title: 1. Legionellen-Prävention auf Molekularebene
items.p1: In ausgedehnten Hotelnetzwerken kann stagnierendes Wasser in temporär ungenutzten Suiten zur tödlichen Falle werden. Legionellen proliferieren in Biofilmen, die sich an rauen Rohrwänden bilden.
items.p2: Die mikroskopische Oberflächenrauheit von K-Aqua PP-R liegt bei 0.007 mm. Es gibt keine Poren, keine Nischen, keine Ankerpunkte. In Kombination mit thermischer Desinfektion bieten wir das sterilste Umfeld, das physikalisch möglich ist.

items.title: 2. Absolute Schallabsorption
items.p1: Jedes Dezibel zählt. In Luxusresorts darf der Toilettenspülvorgang oder das Duschen in der Nachbarsuite nicht wahrnehmbar sein.
items.p2: Durch die hohe Dichte unseres Verbundmaterials (K-Aqua Faserverbund) und den hohen inneren Dämpfungsfaktor reduzieren wir den Körperschall um bis zu 80% gegenüber metallischen Systemen. Ein Unterschied, den Ihre Gäste nicht hören werden.

items.title: 3. Hochdruck-Resilienz in Skyscrapern
items.p1: Hotels mit 80, 100 oder 120 Stockwerken stellen extreme Anforderungen an die Steigleitungen. Der hydrostatische Druck im unteren Bereich des Gebäudes ist enorm.
items.p2: K-Aqua bietet spezielle Druckstufen (SDR 6 / PN 20) in Kombination mit Faserverstärkung, die auch bei Temperaturen von 70°C eine Lebensdauer von über 50 Jahren unter Dauerlast garantieren. Wir bezwingen die Schwerkraft.

items.title: 4. Thermal Management & District Cooling
items.p1: In Wüstenregionen wie Dubai oder Riad ist Kälte das teuerste Gut. District Cooling Systeme transportieren gekühltes Wasser über weite Strecken zum Resort.
items.p2: Die exzellenten Isolationswerte von PP-R verhindern Kondensatbildung und minimieren den Kühlverlust massiv. Keine durchgerosteten Chiller-Pipes mehr, keine tropfenden Decken. Nur reine, unverfälschte Effizienz.

hero.desc: The industrial authority for flawless, prefabricated piping systems. Designed to last for generations, crafted with the precision that leads the world market. Where mistakes are not an option, K-Aqua begins.

intro.title: Why the global market trusts K-Aqua.
intro.lead: When you're designing a building that scrapes the sky or a hospital where every second counts, you can't rely on the variables of site manufacturing. You need the clinical precision of industrial prefabrication.
intro.p1: In the modern construction industry, time, quality and safety are the most valuable resources. Traditional pipe assembly on the construction site involves incalculable risks: weather conditions, varying quality of craftsmanship, lack of space and unforeseeable delays. K-Aqua completely eliminates these variables.
intro.p2: Our prefabrication solutions transform the unpredictable craft of pipe installation into a highly controlled, industrial process. There are optimal conditions in our German production facilities. Temperature, humidity, cleanliness – everything is precisely tailored to the welding process of our PPR-C (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) systems.
intro.quote: "We don't sell pipes. We sell the absolute certainty that a system will function maintenance-free for the next 50 years."
intro.p3: From complex distribution stations to risers to tailor-made special solutions for industrial cooling systems - we manufacture according to your ISO drawings or develop the optimal digital twin together with your engineering team, which is then implemented into physical reality.

items.title: Billion dollar projects do not forgive mistakes.
items.desc: In the world of global construction infrastructure – whether in the desert metropolises of the Middle East or in European high-tech centres – downtime is synonymous with catastrophic losses. Our prefabrication systems are developed for a reality in which material failure must be absolutely impossible.

items.title: Digital precision meets German engineering.
items.desc: Every piping system, every distributor and every special module is planned as a digital twin in our state-of-the-art BIM (Building Information Modelling) environments with millimetre precision. Only when the simulation confirms perfect flow dynamics and absolute resilience under extreme conditions does production begin.

items.title: Homogeneous fusion at the molecular level.
items.desc: In contrast to mechanical connections or glued systems, we use the most advanced thermal polyfusion welding processes. Pipe and fitting merge into a single, inseparable unit. The result is a cohesive connection that is stronger than the actual pipe itself.

items.title: 100% test report. No exceptions.
items.desc: Before a prefabricated K-Aqua module leaves our factory, it goes through a draconian testing programme. From hydrostatic pressure tests far beyond the industrial standard, to ultrasonic weld seam inspections, to optical 3D measurement. German zero-error tolerance in its purest form.

bento.title: The DNA of our systems.

items.title: PPR-C (Type 3) material
items.desc: Our base material offers unparalleled thermal and chemical resistance. It withstands extreme temperatures and aggressive media without degradation.

items.title: Absolute freedom from corrosion
items.desc: While metal systems slowly degrade from the first day of installation, our polymer system remains completely immune to corrosion, pitting and incrustation.

items.title: Acoustic insulation
items.desc: The molecular structure of K-Aqua pipes absorbs sound waves significantly better than metal, resulting in whisper-quiet systems - essential in luxury hotels and hospitals.

items.title: Low pressure loss

visual.p1: Look at the weld seam of a K-Aqua prefabrication module under the microscope. You won't find a seam. You will see a single, homogeneous piece of material.
visual.p2: This process requires not only sophisticated machinery, but also the trained eyes and steady hands of our tested plastic welders. Every parameter – temperature, warm-up time, joining pressure and cooling time – is monitored meticulously.
visual.p3: It is this microscopic obsession with detail that enables our macroscopic guarantee of over 50 years of trouble-free operation.

The material does not release any smell, taste or pollutants into the water. It proactively prevents the growth of Legionella thanks to its extremely smooth inner surface, which does not provide breeding grounds for biofilms.
manifesto.p3: At the same time, our industrial cooling and heating water pipes are able to withstand the most aggressive chemicals. The SDR (Standard Dimension Ratio) classifications of our pipes allow precise adaptation to the specific pressure and temperature profiles of your project.

meta.desc: K-Aqua high-rise construction – uncompromising security through German engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.desc: Megaprojects require more than just pipes. They require a pristine, maintenance-free circulatory system that can withstand extreme hydrostatic pressure and tectonic fluctuations. K-Aqua delivers uncompromising security for the world's most demanding buildings.

intro.title: A building is only as strong as its veins.
intro.lead: At an altitude of 500 meters, physics does not forgive design errors. A hairline crack in a riser means catastrophic damage running into millions of dollars. That's why at K-Aqua we leave nothing to chance.
intro.p1: High-rise buildings are vertical cities. They pulsate, they move, they breathe. With each floor, the hydrostatic pressure increases exponentially. Wind loads cause micro-vibrations throughout the structure. Temperature differences between the icy foundation and the sun-drenched top lead to enormous thermal linear expansion.
intro.p2: Traditional metallic piping systems reach their absolute physical limits here. Corrosion, pitting, incrustation and fatigue fractures on the weld seams are not a question of "if", but of "when". In high-rise construction, a leak is not just a technical problem - it is a financial risk that can jeopardize an entire project.
intro.p3: K-Aqua high-performance polymers (PP-R & PP-RCT) fundamentally change the rules of the game in high-rise infrastructure. They don't corrode. They don't calcify. And thanks to our homogeneous thermal welding technology, pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into a single, inseparable unit. The circulatory system becomes as strong as the material itself.

sticky.title: Mastering the physics of heights.
sticky.lead: Four fundamental challenges in high-rise construction - and how K-Aqua's German engineering mastery overcomes them.

items.title: Extreme hydrostatic pressure
items.desc: The water column grows with every meter of height. In megatalls, pressures of more than 30 bar arise. K-Aqua PP-RCT (Polypropylene Random Copolymer with modified Crystallinity and Temperature resistance) pipes offer up to 50% higher compressive strength at high temperatures compared to standard PP-R. They act as an indestructible backbone of the water supply, even in zones of maximum static load.

items.title: Thermal linear expansion & tension control
items.desc: Pumping hot water through a 300 meter long pipe creates immense linear expansion and shear forces. Our fiber composite technology reduces thermal expansion by up to 75%. This means fewer attachment points, no expansion loops and ultimate structural integrity packaged in a lightweight, easy-to-assemble system.

items.title: Molecular homogeneity (no leakage)
items.desc: Where O-rings or press fittings made of elastomers are installed, leaks inevitably occur due to aging. K-Aqua completely eliminates seals. Thermal heating element socket welding fuses the pipe and fitting at exactly 260°C. The resulting connection is as mechanically strong as the pipe itself. Zero leaks. Guaranteed for life.

items.title: Acoustic decoupling (sound insulation)
items.desc: In luxury penthouses and high-end offices, silence is the ultimate commodity. Flow noises and pressure shocks must be eliminated. The high material density and sound-absorbing properties of our PP-R polymers massively dampen structure-borne noise and flow noise and far exceed the strict requirements of DIN 4109 and VDI 4100.

bento.title: Architecture for eternity.
bento.lead: Precision manufactured according to the strictest German standards for 100% maintenance freedom. We define the global standard in the segment of piping systems for skyscrapers.

items.title: The PP-RCT revolution
items.desc: The next generation of polypropylene. Modified crystalline structure for unprecedented pressure and temperature resistance with reduced wall thickness. Maximizes flow, minimizes weight – a crucial factor in the statics of large buildings.

items.title: DIN EN ISO 15874
items.desc: tested safety by independent German testing institutes such as SKZ and DVGW. Highest drinking water quality, no leaching.

items.title: Absolute corrosion resistance
items.desc: Insensitive to pH value fluctuations, aggressive water qualities, chlorination and electrochemical corrosion (pitting).

items.title: Complete prefabrication
items.desc: Time is the most expensive commodity on the construction site. We deliver prefabricated distribution arrays, meter bars and riser components directly 'just-in-time' with millimeter precision. Reduces installation time by up to 60% and eliminates sources of error on the construction site.

timeline.title: The project cycle
timeline.desc: From the first flow simulation to decades of maintenance-free operation. The K-Aqua engineering team accompanies your mega project from the idea to commissioning.

items.text: Our engineers support the design of the risers, the calculation of the pressure zones and provide complete BIM data (Revit) for collision checking and TGA planning.

items.title: Precision extrusion
items.text: In our state-of-the-art facilities in Germany, pipes and fittings are manufactured under constant ultrasonic wall thickness control and the strictest laboratory monitoring. Every batch is 100% traceable.

items.title: Just-in-time logistics
items.text: Through our global sales network, we ensure that the material arrives at the construction site on time - whether in the desert of Dubai, in Singapore or in Frankfurt am Main.

items.title: Homogeneous fusion
items.text: Local installers are trained on site by our technicians. The thermal welded connections are made in a matter of seconds and are fully pressure-resistant immediately after they have cooled down.

items.title: Maintenance-free operation
items.text: After the final pressure test, our systems disappear into the shaft or concrete. You will never have to think about them again for the next 50+ years. An invisible, perfect network.

data.title: Fact-based superiority.
data.lead: General contractors don't believe marketing promises. They believe in tensile strength, creep curves, dynamic pressure resistance and FNCT (Full Notch Creep Tests).
data.p1: The service life of a plastic pipe under pressure and temperature is determined by the creep internal pressure strength (creep curves). The standard industry specifications assume an operating life of 50 years. Our internal laboratory tests and thermal-oxidative ageing simulations verify durability for a service life of over 100 years. The K-Aqua PP-RCT material significantly delays the onset of thermal-oxidative degradation, even in circulation pipes with permanently high temperatures.
data.p2: Metal pipes become rough over the years due to corrosion and incrustation. The pipe friction loss increases, the cross section narrows, and the energy required for the feed pumps explodes. K-Aqua pipes have an absolute surface roughness of k = 0.007 mm. This mirror-smooth surface remains absolutely constant throughout its entire service life. The result: minimal pressure loss, massive energy savings when operating the pump and absolute hygiene, as neither biofilm nor legionella can attach.

items.title: Molecular homogeneity
items.p1: The K-AQUA PPR system is based on advanced polyfusion technology. Through precisely calibrated heating, the pipe and fitting fuse at the molecular level into an inseparable, coherent unit.
items.p2: This seamless synthesis eliminates any weak points that inevitably arise with mechanical connections or gluing methods. The result is an infrastructure of absolute integrity that confidently withstands hydraulic shocks and extreme pressure peaks.

items.title: Thermal endurance
items.p1: Thermische Fluktuationen sind der Hauptfeind konventioneller Rohrleitungssysteme. K-AQUA Polymere sind durch ein hochverdichtetes Kristallgitter strukturiert, das selbst bei permanenten Betriebstemperaturen von bis zu 95°C strukturelle Deformationen verhindert.
items.p2: Die spezifische Wärmekapazität des Materials reduziert zudem die Notwendigkeit extremer Isolierungen, was die Energieeffizienz des Gesamtsystems signifikant steigert.

items.title: Hydraulische Perfektion
items.p1: Ein absoluter Rauheitswert von lediglich 0,007 mm definiert die Innenoberfläche der K-AQUA Rohre. Diese mikroskopisch glatte Topografie verhindert jegliche Inkrustation, Mineralablagerungen oder Biofilmbildung.
items.p2: Strömungsverluste werden auf ein physikalisches Minimum reduziert, was den Energiebedarf der Pumpensysteme über Jahrzehnte hinweg drastisch senkt. Der konstante Innendurchmesser garantiert eine perpetuelle, unverminderte Durchflussrate.

items.title: Chemische Immunität
items.p1: Im Gegensatz zu metallischen Systemen ist das K-AQUA PPR-Netzwerk vollständig immun gegen Oxidation, Lochfraß und galvanische Korrosion. Die inerten Eigenschaften des Copolymers widerstehen einer extremen Bandbreite hochaggressiver Chemikalien und variierender pH-Werte.
items.p2: Selbst in hochkorrosiven industriellen Umgebungen oder bei der Beförderung aggressiver Fluide bleibt die molekulare Integrität der Leitung unangetastet.

header.title: Physikalische Überlegenheit.

items.text: Evaluation der thermodynamischen und fluiddynamischen Anforderungen. Präzise Berechnung von Druckstufen, thermischer Längenausdehnung und hydraulischen Widerständen durch unsere Ingenieure.

items.text: Selektion des optimalen PPR-Copolymers. Abstimmung der Wandstärken und Dimensionen (20mm bis 160mm) auf die spezifischen Belastungsprofile der industriellen Anwendung.

intro.title: Jenseits konventioneller Belastungsgrenzen.
intro.p1: Wo metallische Rohrsysteme durch Korrosion, Inkrustation und thermische Materialermüdung kapitulieren, beginnt das operative Spektrum von K-AQUA. Unsere Polypropylen-Random-Copolymer (PPR) Infrastrukturen definieren die physikalischen Grenzen des Fluidtransports neu.
intro.p2: Jeder Millimeter unseres Systems ist das Resultat jahrzehntelanger materialwissenschaftlicher Forschung. Wir liefern keine simplen Rohre; wir implementieren makellose, monolithische Lebensadern für Anlagen, die keinen Raum für Ausfälle tolerieren. Von arktischer Kälte bis hin zu siedenden industriellen Prozessen – K-AQUA ist die architektonische Antwort auf extreme ingenieurstechnische Herausforderungen.

meta.title: Data centre infrastructure | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua data centres – uncompromising security through German engineering for global megaprojects.

items.title: The thermal challenge of AI and HPC
items.desc: Modern high-performance computing (HPC) and artificial intelligence (AI) racks produce immense waste heat. Air cooling alone reaches its physical limits. The future belongs to liquid cooling – and therefore water as a critical heat transfer medium directly on the chip.

items.title: Corrosion is the enemy of availability
items.desc: Metallic piping systems are subject to pitting, rust and chemical decomposition during continuous operation. A micro-crack in a data centre can cause millions in damages due to server failures. K-Aqua eliminates this risk with 100% corrosion-free polypropylene random copolymer (PP-R).

items.title: Ultrasound welded molecular connections
items.desc: Where conventional pipes rely on error-prone seals or screw connections, K-Aqua systems merge on a molecular level. The result: A completely homogeneous, absolutely leak-free pipeline network. Zero tolerance for leaks.

items.title: Sustainability & PUE optimisation
items.desc: A low PUE value (Power Usage Effectiveness) is the holy grail of data centre operators. K-Aqua pipes have excellent thermodynamic properties. Lower pipe friction losses and optimal thermal insulation massively minimise energy losses during cooling water circulation.

items.title: Flow simulation & design
items.text: Our engineers analyse the cooling requirements of the data centre. We calculate volume flows, eliminate bottlenecks and dimension the pipe network for maximum hydrodynamic efficiency.

items.title: Precision prefabrication
items.text: In the main factory in Germany, complex distribution spools are prefabricated to measure. Accurate to the centimetre, fully automated and quality assured under laboratory conditions.

items.title: Just-in-time logistics
items.text: Megaprojects do not forgive delivery delays. We coordinate global logistics directly on the construction site, synchronised with the strict rhythm of the general contractors.

items.title: Homogeneous welding
items.text: Local installation teams are tested by K-Aqua master welders. The molecular welding on the construction site guarantees a 100% leak-free, homogeneous pipe structure with no weak points.

items.title: Pressure testing & certification
items.text: Before handover, a relentless hydraulic pressure and load test is carried out. Only when the system passes these tests do we issue approval and assume the full system guarantee.

timeline.title: The engineering process
timeline.desc: From the hydrodynamic sketch to the final acceptance: How we implement global hyperscale infrastructures without compromises and in record time.

hero.desc: When cooling systems are at the heart of global data centres, material failure is not an option. Discover the safest, most efficient and scalable PP-R piping solution for mission-critical refrigeration and air conditioning.

section1.title: Why classic pipes fail.
section1.lead: The requirements of modern hyperscalers and AI clusters exceed the physical limits of traditional metal systems.

section2.title: Materials Science for the 21st Century.
section2.lead: Every atomic detail of our system has been optimised for absolute reliability and durability.

items.title: Chemical neutrality & purity
items.desc: Closed cooling circuits require conditioning agents. K-Aqua is completely inert towards aggressive additives and completely prevents algae and biofilm formation. No chemical decomposition, no particles in the cooling water.

items.title: Pressure resilience in high-rise buildings
items.desc: Designed for constant maximum loads under extreme PN10 / PN20 pressure conditions in vertical high-rise data centres.

items.title: German prefabrication
items.desc: We pre-weld complex distribution blocks in our main factory in Germany. Plug-and-play delivery for drastically reduced construction times.

items.title: Earthquake-proof (Seismic Resistance)
items.desc: In contrast to rigid metal systems, our PP-R system has a defined intrinsic elasticity. Shock waves and massive vibrations from emergency generators or strong seismic activity are absorbed instead of causing destructive fractures.

hero.desc: Wir machen keine Kompromisse. Wir definieren den globalen Standard für PP-R Rohrleitungssysteme. Willkommen im Epizentrum deutscher Ingenieurskunst.

intro.desc: Seit über 30 Jahren fertigen wir Rohrleitungssysteme, die für die Ewigkeit gebaut sind. Kein Raum für Fehler. Kein Platz für Mittelmaß. Nur reine, unerbittliche Präzision, die sich in jedem einzelnen Fitting manifestiert.

material.p1: PP-R Typ 3 ist nicht einfach ein Kunststoff. Es ist ein hochkomplexes, thermoplastisches Material, das wir auf molekularer Ebene beherrschen.
material.p2: Durch die strategische Anordnung von Ethylen-Monomeren in der Propylen-Kette erreichen wir eine unerreichte Schlagzähigkeit – selbst bei Minustemperaturen. Unsere Granulate stammen ausschließlich von der globalen Elite der Rohstoffproduzenten. Wir analysieren jede Charge mittels Differential Scanning Calorimetry (DSC) und Melt Flow Rate (MFR) Tests. Was unsere Spezifikationen um auch nur ein Promille verfehlt, wird erbarmungslos eliminiert.

items.title: Extreme Molmasse
items.desc: Garantiert maximale Zeitstandfestigkeit und absoluten Widerstand gegen Spannungsrisskorrosion unter extremen Drücken.

items.title: Kristalline Optimierung
items.desc: Die perfekte thermodynamische Balance. Höchste Flexibilität für radikale Verlegebedingungen bei simultaner axialer Steifigkeit.

timeline.title: Die Evolution der Perfektion
timeline.desc: Ein unaufhaltsamer Aufstieg zur globalen Marktmacht. Jede Dekade ein Meilenstein technologischer Überlegenheit.

items.title: Der Ursprung der Toleranzlosigkeit
items.text: Wo andere Kompromisse machten, zogen wir eine rote Linie. Die Gründung von K-Aqua basierte auf einem einzigen, unerschütterlichen Prinzip: Makellose Rohrleitungssysteme. Unsere ersten Extruder liefen mit einer Präzision, die den Markt schockierte.

items.title: Die Polypropylen-Revolution
items.text: Wir weigerten uns, den Status quo zu akzeptieren. Mit der Einführung unserer proprietären PP-R Mischung definierten wir thermische Stabilität neu. Während Konkurrenzprodukte unter Druck kollabierten, blieben unsere Systeme stoisch intakt. Ein Triumph der Polymerchemie.

items.title: Die architektonische Symbiose
items.text: Von den Skylines in Dubai bis zu den Industrieanlagen im Ruhrgebiet – K-Aqua wurde zum Synonym für unzerstörbare Infrastruktur. Unsere PP-RCT Faserverbundrohre revolutionierten den Hochbau. Weniger Ausdehnung, mehr Durchfluss, absolute Dominanz.

items.title: Die Molekulare Diktatur
items.text: Heute kontrollieren wir jeden Aspekt der Produktion. Von der Auswahl der Rohgranulate bis zur Endinspektion unterliegen unsere Systeme einem diktatorischen Qualitätsregime. Das Ergebnis? Eine garantierte Lebensdauer, die Generationen überdauert.

sticky.title: Die Vier Säulen der Macht.
sticky.lead: Technologie, die an Magie grenzt. Wir haben die Limitierungen herkömmlicher Rohrsysteme nicht nur überwunden, wir haben sie pulverisiert.

items.title: Absolutismus in der Qualität
items.desc: Jeder Millimeter unserer PP-R und PP-RCT Systeme durchläuft brutalste Belastungstests. 50 Jahre Lebensdauer sind kein Versprechen, sondern eine mathematische Gewissheit. Wir tolerieren null Abweichungen. Was unsere Hallen verlässt, ist Perfektion in Polymerform.

items.title: Thermische Unverwundbarkeit
items.desc: Unsere Faserverbundrohre (K-Aqua Faser) neutralisieren thermische Längenausdehnung beinahe vollständig. Ob eiskalte -20°C oder kochende +95°C, unsere Systeme bleiben absolut formstabil. Eine ingenieurstechnische Meisterleistung, die den physikalischen Gesetzen zu trotzen scheint.

items.title: Chemische Resistenz
items.desc: Korrosion existiert in unserem Vokabular nicht. Unsere Polymere sind immun gegen aggressivste Medien, Inkrustation und biologische Zersetzung. Während Metalle im Boden rosten und verfallen, bleibt K-Aqua unangetastet – stoisch, monolithisch, unverwüstlich.

items.title: Molekulare Fusion
items.desc: Durch unser homogenes Schweißverfahren verschmelzen Rohr und Fitting auf molekularer Ebene zu einer untrennbaren Einheit. Keine Dichtungen, die ermüden können. Keine mechanischen Schwachstellen. Eine monolithische Struktur, die ewig hält.

bento.title: Infrastruktur auf Steroiden.
bento.lead: Wir fertigen nicht einfach Rohre. Wir erschaffen die Arterien der modernen Zivilisation. K-Aqua ist das Rückgrat industrieller und architektonischer Megaprojekte weltweit.

items.title: Brachiale Extrusion
items.desc: Hochleistungsanlagen, die unter brutalem Druck arbeiten. Das Resultat ist eine unübertroffene Wandstärkenkonsistenz bis in den Mikrometerbereich.

items.title: geprüfte Überlegenheit
items.desc: ISO 9001, 14001, 50001. Wir übertreffen die Normen nicht nur, wir diktieren sie. Internationale Akkreditierung als absoluter Standard.

items.title: Hygiene-Diktat
items.desc: Lebensmittelecht, toxikologisch unbedenklich und absolut keimresistent. Trinkwasser bleibt in K-Aqua Systemen unangetastet rein. Keine Ausnahme.

items.desc: Vollständig recyclebar. Minimale CO2-Bilanz bei der Herstellung. Weil wahre technologische Macht immer auch Verantwortung für die Zukunft bedeutet.

items.desc: Wir bedienen nicht einfach Märkte, wir dominieren sie durch radikale Kundenfokussierung. Ihre Anforderungen sind unser Befehl. Unsere Lösungen sind präzise, skalierbar und absolut kompromisslos in ihrer Ausführung.

meta.title: Schulungen | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Schulungen – Kompromisslose Sicherheit durch German Engineering für globale Megaprojekte.

hero.desc: Das K-Aqua Schulungsprogramm ist keine gewöhnliche Weiterbildung. Es ist die Initiation in die kompromisslose Welt des deutschen Rohrleitungsbaus. Für Ingenieure und Techniker, die Megaprojekte verantworten, in denen Materialversagen keine Option, sondern eine absolute Katastrophe darstellt. Wir lehren in Mikrometern, wir denken in Jahrzehnten.

manifesto.p1: It is the result of relentless methodology and cold, industrial discipline. When thousands of cubic metres of water are pumped under enormous pressure through the lifelines of a 100-storey skyscraper, there is no room for approximations or interpretations.
manifesto.p2: The K-Aqua training programme was developed to bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and flawless, mechanical perfection. Anyone trained in our academy no longer acts as a mere tradesperson – they become the executive organ of a perfect, deterministic system.

bento.title: Knowledge as an absolute weapon.
bento.lead: Our technical training modules are not designed to make things easy for you. They are designed to mercilessly eradicate errors.

items.title: Homogeneous Material Fusion
items.desc: Beyond bonding or unstable mechanical seals. We train the exact calibration of temperature, pressure and time in order to fuse pipes and fittings into an inseparable, monolithic structure at a molecular level.

items.title: Destructive Analytics
items.desc: To understand the limits, one must exceed them. Practical modules in our high-pressure test rigs with bursting pressures far beyond 100 bar. We analyse failure to eliminate it in practice.

items.title: Thermal Linear Expansion
items.desc: Cold-blooded compensation of temperature fluctuations in large-scale projects through precisely calculated expansion loops and fixed-point systems.

items.title: Aggressive Media & pH Stability
items.desc: In-depth analysis of resistance to highly concentrated industrial chemicals. The academy imparts profound knowledge on material fatigue under continuous chemical stress and radical pH shifts.

curriculum.title: Academic uncompromisingness.
curriculum.lead: Four modules. One doctrine. Every segment of our curriculum is geared towards identifying weaknesses in execution and systemically annihilating them.

items.title: Module Alpha: Fluid Mechanics & Kinetics
items.desc: The mathematics of water. We break down complex cavitation effects and water hammer scenarios into calculable variables. You learn not merely to dampen hydrodynamic shock symptoms, but to systemically eliminate them. For pipe networks that operate in complete, silent perfection.

items.title: Module Beta: Parametric Pipe Design
items.desc: The design of piping systems as an algorithmic discipline. The training includes the use of state-of-the-art CAD/BIM tools for clash detection and to optimise material utilisation. No estimation. Pure, cold calculation.

items.title: Module Gamma: Hygiene Architecture & Microbiology
items.desc: Legionella prevention at a structural level. How to avoid dead legs, obliterate stagnation zones and control water temperature stratifications in complex ring main systems. The system dictates the purity – we leave nothing to chance.

items.title: Module Delta: The Final K-Aqua Audit
items.desc: Certification is not a right; it is a privilege. The examination demands the construction and theoretical defence of a self-sufficient water supply system under simulated extreme conditions (e.g. seismic activity, 50°C external temperature). Only those who prove absolute faultlessness carry the K-Aqua certificate.

timeline.title: The Certification Path.
timeline.desc: The transformation from installer to tested K-Aqua Master Engineer follows a strict, relentless rhythm. Only those who walk this path to the very end receive authorisation for our high-performance systems.

items.title: Material Physics & Onboarding
items.text: Grasping the physical limits. An in-depth introduction to the molecular PP-R/PP-RCT material specifications. This is where the foundation of industrial toughness is cast.

items.title: Laboratory & Stress Tests
items.text: Hands-on destruction. Experiencing the bursting limit in the test rig and studying microscopic crack formations. Only those who know the weakness can construct absolute strength.

items.title: Fusion Doctrine
items.text: The perfect welding protocol. Mechanical training of thermodynamic movements until they become an infallible, muscular automatism. Every motion is calibrated.

items.title: System Architecture
items.text: Scaling from a simple pipe segment to the infrastructure of a skyscraper. We execute pressure loss tables, flow velocities and flow dividers with ironclad logic.

items.title: The Master Examination
items.text: A 48-hour audit under the merciless supervision of German chief engineers. No tolerance for miscalculations. One mistake means immediate expulsion.

spec.title: The global benchmark for safety.
spec.desc: Our certification is not merely a piece of paper. It is a promise cast in titanium to builders and investors worldwide. Where the K-Aqua certificate is present, the installation has been carried out according to the strictest German engineering standards.

items.title: International Validity
items.text: Recognised by the world's leading building and supervisory authorities.

items.title: Audit transparency
items.text: Seamless, digital documentation of every welding process.

items.title: Lifelong authority
items.text: Once acquired, it marks the engineer as part of an elite tier.

hero.desc: This module delivers uncompromising security for the most demanding projects worldwide. Crafted to the strictest industry standards to last for generations. Because material failure is never an option.

manifesto.title2: The process behind it is made of steel.
manifesto.p1: Many manufacturers see standards as the ultimate goal. We see it as the absolute lower limit. Our internal tolerances are many times stricter than what DVGW, ISO or SKZ require. When a K-Aqua pipe leaves our factory, it has been analysed at the molecular level, tortured with extreme pressures and thermally pushed to the absolute limit.

bento.title: The DNA of a perfect pipe system.
bento.lead: When international general contractors plan billion-dollar projects, they don't trust marketing promises. They demand hard, physically measurable facts.

items.title: Extreme pressure resistance
items.desc: tested for continuous loads up to PN20/PN25. Our burst pressure tests prove reserves that go far beyond the standards. Burst pipes are a thing of the past.

items.title: Thermal sovereignty
items.desc: Permanently resistant from -20°C to +95°C. No material fatigue, no structural weakening – even in the event of extreme thermal shocks.

items.title: Absolute hygiene
items.desc: No corrosion. No incrustation. Food-safe, toxicologically harmless and resistant to legionella growth.

items.title: Fire protection (B1/B2)

items.title: Life cycle guarantee

certifications.title: The toughest examiners in the world.
certifications.lead: Only those who pass the most critical external audits are allowed to bear the 'German Engineering' label. Here are the institutions that validate our quality.

items.title: DVGW – The highest authority
items.p1: The German Gas and Water Association (DVGW) sets the world's strictest standards for drinking water hygiene and material resistance.
items.p2: Our DVGW certification guarantees that K-Aqua pipe systems neither release toxic substances nor promote microbiological growth under extreme conditions. Each batch undergoes long-term hydrostatic tests (creep internal pressure test) at 95°C.

items.title: SKZ – Independent monitoring
items.p1: The South German Plastics Centre (SKZ) acts as our incorruptible auditor. External third-party monitoring ensures what our internal laboratories already specify.
items.p2: Notched impact strength, tensile strength and thermal behaviour are tested using DSC analysis (Dynamic Scanning Calorimetry). The SKZ mark is proof of mechanical perfection, far beyond DIN EN ISO 15874.

items.title: KTW-BWGL – Absolute purity
items.p1: The assessment basis for plastics and other organic materials in contact with drinking water (Federal Environment Agency).
items.p2: We only use high-purity polypropylene (PP-R / PP-RCT) without harmful additives or heavy metals. The result? Spring water quality straight from the tap. No smell or taste impairment.

items.title: ISO 9001 & 14001 – Systematic Excellence
items.p1: Quality is not a coincidence, but an absolutely reproducible process. Our ISO 9001 certification proves seamless quality management from the receipt of raw materials to the worldwide delivery of goods.
items.p2: With ISO 14001 we prove that industrial excellence and ecological responsibility go hand in hand. Minimised energy consumption, efficient use of resources and the 100% recyclability of our PP products.

lab.desc: Before a K-Aqua system leaves the factory, it must go through our in-house test centre. A highly upgraded facility where we expose materials to conditions they will never experience in reality.

items.title: MFR (Melt Flow Rate)
items.desc: Control melt flow rate to ensure accurate viscosity during extrusion and subsequent welding on site.

items.title: OIT (Oxidation Induction Time)
items.desc: Thermal analysis to determine ageing resistance. Proof that our stabilisers protect plastic from degradation for decades.

items.title: Creep internal pressure test
items.desc: Pipe samples are stored in special water baths at 95°C under extreme pressure – for thousands of hours. Without crack. Without breakage.

timeline.title: Decades of innovation.
timeline.desc: Our quality standards were not created overnight. They are the result of decades of engineering and continuous process optimisation.

items.title: The birth of the standard
items.text: As pioneers of plastic pipe extrusion, we implemented internal testing procedures at an early stage that went far beyond the industry requirements of the time. The foundation for an uncompromising quality culture.

items.title: DVGW & SKZ certification

meta.title: Technical Glossary | K-Aqua
meta.desc: K-Aqua Glossary – Uncompromising security through German engineering for global megaprojects.

hero.desc: Welcome to the lexical core of piping technology. Here we decode the principles of German engineering. No marketing. Just physical facts, materials science and industrial authority.

manifesto.title: The Architecture of Infallibility.
manifesto.lead: A piping system is the cardiovascular system of any megaproject. A failure means an infrastructural heart attack. That's why we're not talking about pipes, but about vital industrial arteries. Each term in this glossary represents a pillar of our zero-defect philosophy.

scroll.title: The K-Aqua process.
scroll.lead: From the molecular granulate level to the final pressure test. Understand the physical principles that make our systems indestructible.

items.title: Extrusion dynamics under high pressure
items.desc: Thermoplastic forming in our factories is subject to precise temperature control to within 0.1°C. This crystalline perfection guarantees a flawless, homogeneous molecular structure that absolutely excludes microscopic cracking, even under extreme pressure and temperature fluctuations. When the material leaves our extruder, it is no longer a simple plastic - it is an industrial monolith.

items.title: Hydrostatic load tests
items.desc: In our test laboratories, every pipe is subjected to a hydrostatic simulation that exceeds real conditions many times over. We apply internal pressures that go beyond any normative requirement (up to 100 bar, depending on the SDR class). This ensures the integrity of the welds and the molecular elasticity of the PP-R material over a predicted service life of more than 50 years in critical infrastructure.

items.title: Polyfusion welding technology
items.desc: Connections are the weak point in traditional systems. K-Aqua eliminates this risk through polyfusion. At the molecular level, pipe and fitting merge into an inseparable, continuous unit. There are no threads to corrode, no seals to fail. The result is a piping system that behaves as if it were cast from a single piece.

items.title: Cavitation resistance & fluid mechanics
items.desc: Thanks to an ultra-smooth inner wall (roughness < 0.007 mm), K-Aqua pipes minimize flow resistance to zero. This prevents the formation of biofilms and eliminates micro-cavitation effects in high-velocity flows. Pressure losses in the system are drastically reduced, maximizing the energy efficiency of the connected pump systems on an industrial scale.

bento.title: Technical parameters.
bento.lead: The most important vocabulary of industrial piping technology, distilled to its essence.

items.title: PP-R (Polypropylene Random Copolymer)
items.desc: The molecular basis. A highly crystalline thermoplastic polymer that offers exceptional resistance to high temperatures and pressures. It is the DNA of our longevity.

items.title: Linear thermal expansion
items.desc: The change in length of the material when the temperature changes. Our fiber-reinforced (fiber) pipes reduce this value to an absolute minimum (α = 0.035 mm/mK), which enormously increases the structural stability in shafts.

items.title: creep strength
items.desc: The ability of the system to withstand constant internal pressure at specific temperatures for decades without deforming or bursting. K-Aqua pipes are calibrated to last 50+ years.

items.title: Pressure loss coefficient
items.desc: A mathematical value that describes the energy loss of the flow due to friction on the inner wall of the pipe. This value is marginalized in K-Aqua systems due to nano-smooth surfaces.

items.title: SDR (Standard Dimension Ratio)
items.desc: The relationship between the outside diameter (d) and the wall thickness (s). An SDR 6 tube can withstand massively higher pressures than an SDR 11 tube. The correct choice is crucial for system design.
items.label: 50+ YRS

timeline.title: Regulatory toughness.
timeline.desc: For us, standards are not regulations, but rather the starting point of our engineering skills. A chronology of the certifications and standards that our systems not only meet, but dominate.

items.title: Normative basis
items.text: The basis of German piping standards. We do not view these standards as a goal, but as an absolute minimum. Our internal tolerances are up to 30% stricter than required by DIN.

items.title: Global certification
items.text: The international seal of quality for plastic piping systems for hot and cold water installations. Proof of the uncompromising global applicability of our systems.

items.title: Standard Dimension Ratios
items.text: A precise ratio of outside diameter to wall thickness. Our engineers calibrate each batch to guarantee maximum pressure resistance at optimal flow rate.

items.title: Hygiene & material testing
items.text: Certificates that certify the absolute authenticity of food and drinking water. No heavy metals, no leaching. Pure, uncontaminated fluid dynamics for the highest hygienic demands.

conclusion.title: Resistance to decomposition in extreme cases.
conclusion.p1: In industrial applications, it is not the normal operation that determines the quality of a piping system, but rather the stability in the limit areas. Chemical corrosion, cavitation from pressure shocks and thermal shock are the natural enemies of conventional installations.
conclusion.p2: The K-Aqua Matrix isolates the fluid medium from the environment through an inert barrier layer. There is no ion exchange. Metallic systems degrade from the moment water flows through them. They sacrifice themselves in order to function. Our PP-R system remains flawless inside even after decades.
conclusion.p3: The term environmental stress cracking resistance (ESCR) is of central importance in polymer chemistry. We modify the molecular weight of our copolymer so that it absorbs peak loads rather than breaking under them. The result is a system that absorbs shocks, vibrations and settlement of the building structure.
conclusion.p4: Anyone who understands the terminology of piping technology also understands why compromises can mean ruin. German Engineering is not an empty promise, but the sum of precise, physical parameters that we manifest in every single centimeter of our production.

faq.q: Which media is the system designed for?
faq.a: For drinking water — hot and cold — with high temperature and pressure resistance over decades. Thanks to PP’s resistance to solvents, alkalis and acids, industrial applications are possible too; we verify those with you project by project.

faq.q: What do the five SDR classes stand for?
faq.a: SDR is the ratio of outer diameter to wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure: SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6. You pick exactly the reserve each application needs — without over-dimensioning.

faq.q: When monolayer, when K-Fibre?
faq.a: Monolayer is the economical standard for most applications. The glass-fibre composite cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter, allows wider clamp spacing and stays dimensionally stable in large bores and hot water — the choice for risers, circulation and d ≥ 160.

faq.q: How are the pipes joined?
faq.a: By fusion welding — socket welding by hand (up to d63) or machine, electrofusion via heating-coil fittings, and butt fusion for large bores up to d630. Matching devices and tools are part of the programme; the Academy shows all four methods on video.

faq.q: Is the system compliant for drinking water?
faq.a: The system is engineered for drinking water; polypropylene is neutral in taste and odour. Conformity evidence for drinking-water contact (DVGW/KTW) is available in the Trust Centre as part of the RFP document package.

faq.q: What service life underlies the design?
faq.a: The pressure classes are based on the long-term regression curves of DIN 8077/8078 with a design horizon of 50 years of operation — safety factor included. The two programme anchors: SDR 6 at 20 bar/20 °C and PP-RCT SDR 7.4 at 10 bar/70 °C.

faq.q: Where do I get binding article data?
faq.a: Filter every variant live in the Product Finder and export as CSV. Binding values come from the product catalogue (PDF); for project terms, the five-step project enquiry goes straight to sales — reply within one working day.

faq.q: How long are the ISO certificates valid?
faq.a: Three years — the current cycle runs from 10/2025 to 10/2028, accompanied by annual surveillance audits by the certification body.

faq.q: What does "DAkkS-accredited" mean?
faq.a: DAkkS is Germany’s national accreditation body. It supervises the certification bodies themselves — the accreditation is what makes a certificate internationally robust.

faq.q: How do I verify a certificate?
faq.a: Every certificate carries a certificate number (e.g. Q-2025-6732) and the issuing body. With both, validity can be checked directly with the certification body — or ask us at support@k-aqua.de.

faq.q: Are scope-3 and raw EPD data available?
faq.a: Yes — we provide scope-3 emission data and raw EPD data on request. Proactive transparency instead of box-ticking: your sustainability team gets robust figures for its own accounting.

faq.q: Do you supply GAEB tender texts?
faq.a: Yes, GAEB texts are part of the RFP document package. The K-Aqua system flows into your tendering software and bills of quantities without friction.

faq.q: What is an EPD to EN 15804?
faq.a: A Type III environmental product declaration with verified life-cycle data. It is the data basis for building certifications such as LEED, BREEAM and DGNB — and for CO₂-adjusted procurement models.

academyx.stepLead: Each method has its dimension range — and five steps that decide the quality of the joint.

procs.t: Socket welding by hand — up to d63

steps.d: Cut the pipe square, deburr and chamfer cleanly — use the pipe cutters from the K-Aqua tool programme.
Mark the depth per table (e.g. 14 mm at d20) on the pipe — it defines the fusion zone.
Pipe into the heating socket, fitting onto the spigot — push on simultaneously and hold the heating time exactly.
Join axially within the changeover time. Never rotate: twisting destroys the plasticised structure.
Hold the joint for a few seconds, then respect the cooling time before applying any mechanical load.

procs.t: Socket welding by machine — medium dimensions

steps.d: Cutting, deburring, marking the depth — the ground rules stay identical.
The machine holds both parts coaxially — offset and tilt errors are mechanically excluded.
Heating socket and spigot per DVS reference values; the machine holds position and time reproducibly.
The feed joins axially and evenly — at d75 to d125 the key to consistent quality.
Unclamp and continue working only after the cooling time has elapsed.
Scrape and clean the pipe surface in the fusion zone — oxide skin and dirt prevent fusion.
Mark the depth on the pipe, push the pipe into the fitting up to the stop.
Use holding clamps — the fitting must not be under bending stress during welding.
The unit energises the heating coils embedded in the fitting — parameters come from the fitting, not from gut feeling.
Move or load only after the stated cooling time — check the indicators on the fitting.

procs.t: Butt fusion — large bores up to d630

steps.d: Plane both pipe ends in the machine until continuous shavings appear — plane-parallel faces are mandatory.
Offset no more than 10 % of the wall thickness — at d630 every millimetre counts.
Equalise under pressure until the bead forms, then heat-soak without pressure — times per DVS 2207-11.
Remove the element swiftly and bring the ends together under the defined joining pressure.
Joining pressure stays on until the cooling time ends — producing the homogeneous, permanently tight run.

academyx.errTitle: The six costliest mistakes — and their prevention.
errRows: The bead grows inwards and narrows the cross-section
Stop the heating time by the table — not by feel
The plasticised structure is destroyed, the joint leaks
Join axially only, use the depth mark as a control
Material piles up, the fusion zone becomes uneven
Deburr every cut — the tool is part of the system
Residues burn and embed themselves in the seam
Wipe the heating surfaces with a lint-free cloth before every weld
The seam deforms before it solidifies
Respect cooling times — 8 minutes at d110
Too short: small fusion area · too deep: narrowed bore
Always mark the depth, never estimate
gloss: SDR
Standard Dimension Ratio = outer diameter divided by wall thickness (d/s). Smaller SDR = thicker wall = higher nominal pressure.
PN
Nominal pressure in bar at 20 °C across the design horizon — SDR 6 corresponds to PN 20, SDR 17 to PN 6.
d / di / s
Outer diameter / inner diameter / wall thickness in millimetres — di = d − 2s.
PP-R
Polypropylene random copolymer — the proven standard material for drinking-water installations.
PP-RCT
PP-R with modified crystalline structure ("crystallinity temperature") — more temperature and pressure reserve at the same wall.
K-Fibre / GF
Glass-fibre reinforced multilayer construction — cuts thermal expansion to roughly a quarter.
Socket welding
Pipe and fitting are plasticised over a heating socket and spigot and pushed together.
Electrofusion
Heating coils embedded in the fitting generate the fusion heat — parameter-controlled.
Butt fusion
Plane-parallel pipe ends are heated at an element and joined under pressure — standard up to d630.

posts.teaser: KWT GmbH’s ISO management system now covers quality, environment and energy — DAkkS-accredited.
body: Since October 2025, KWT GmbH’s management system is triple tested: ISO 9001:2015 for quality, ISO 14001:2015 for environment and ISO 50001:2018 for energy. The certificates are issued by a DAkkS-accredited certification body and are valid until October 2028.

For procurement and compliance this means documented, auditable processes from extruder to dispatch. The lived GENAU management system already met the requirements of DIN EN ISO 14001 and 50001 — certification makes it externally robust.
Both certificate versions (DE/EN) are available for download; bundle the full audit package in the Trust Centre.

posts.t: Continuously marked: traceability from the extruder
posts.teaser: Every K-Aqua pipe carries continuous marking applied directly in the extrusion process.
body: At up to 14,000 metres of pipe per day and line, traceability is not optional: every pipe is continuously marked during extrusion — with the information specifiers and inspectors need on site.

The marking links the physical product to its batch and the QA test records. What is printed on the pipe can be traced back to the test lab — one building block of the QA manual that auditors can request in the Trust Centre.

posts.teaser: From flare gas to drinking-water pipe: the short material history of polypropylene.
body: Polypropylene is made from gases that used to be flared off uselessly — using them as a material cuts air pollution at the source. As an engineering plastic, PP is unusually resistant to solvents, alkalis and acids and forms complex geometries in injection moulding.

Inside the pipe, the bore is what counts: at 0.007 mm roughness, pressure loss stays minimal and biofilm and incrustation find little hold. Add thermal conductivity of 0.24 W/(m·K) — hot water stays hot without the line working against itself.
PP-RCT pushes the limits further: the modified crystalline structure brings more temperature and pressure reserve — SDR 7.4 sustains 70 °C at 10 bar continuously.

posts.t: Brass meets polypropylene: transitions into existing stock
posts.teaser: Renovation almost always means a system change — transition pieces with brass threads make it clean.
body: Hardly any project starts on a greenfield: existing copper or galvanised-steel lines must be connected. Transition pieces with embedded brass female or male threads do the job — the thread side connects the metal stock, the PP side is fusion-welded.

This enables section-by-section renovation: corroded runs are replaced, working ones remain — and the corrosion problem does not migrate into the new system. Unions keep the connection detachable where needed, e.g. at valves and water meters.

finderx.helpLead: Five terms are enough to understand every row of the range.
help: Outer diameter in millimetres — the key size of every dimension from d20 to d630.
Standard Dimension Ratio = d/s. Smaller SDR means thicker wall and higher nominal pressure.
Wall thickness in millimetres — follows from d and SDR: s = d/SDR.
Inner diameter = d − 2s. Decisive for flow rate and pressure loss.
Permissible continuous operating pressure in bar at 20 °C across the design horizon — SDR 6 = PN 20 down to SDR 17 = PN 6.

meth.d: Pipe mass follows from ring cross-section × length × density (0.905 g/cm³) — the same geometry as in the dimension tables.

Converted at roughly 25 kg of CO₂ bound per tree per year and 0.15 kg CO₂e per car kilometre — orders of magnitude everyone in the project meeting understands.
